            registerEmojiHandler(socket);
            
            console.log('[EmojiNotificationFix] 🎉 System initialized successfully!');
        });
    }
    
    // بدء التهيئة
    if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init);
    } else {
        init();
    }
    
    // جعل الدالة متاحة عالمياً للاختبار
    window.testEmojiNotification = function(senderName, emojiFile) {
        showEmojiNotification({
            sender_name: senderName || 'Test User',
            emoji: emojiFile || 'happy.gif',
            timestamp: Date.now()
        });
    };
    
    console.log('[EmojiNotificationFix] 📝 Test: window.testEmojiNotification("Name", "zy_face.gif")');
    
})();

// ==================== نظام إدارة الاتصال الصوتي الأساسي إذا لم يكن موجوداً ====================
if (typeof window.audioConnectionManager === 'undefined') {
    window.audioConnectionManager = {
        isInitialized: false,
        
        initialize: function() {
            if (this.isInitialized) {
                console.log('[AudioManager] ✅ النظام مهيأ مسبقاً');
                return Promise.resolve();
            }
            
            console.log('[AudioManager] 🔧 تهيئة نظام الاتصال الصوتي');
            const roomId = window.M || window.room_id || window.user_room;
            
            if (!roomId) {
                return Promise.reject(new Error('لا يوجد roomId'));
            }
            
            // إنشاء نقل استقبال بسيط
            return this.createRecvTransport()
                .then(() => {
                    this.isInitialized = true;
                    console.log('[AudioManager] ✅ التهيئة اكتملت بنجاح');
                    return true;
                });
        },
        
        createRecvTransport: function() {
            return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
                const socket = window.msio || window.S;
                const roomId = window.M || window.room_id || window.user_room;
                
                if (!socket || !socket.connected) {
                    reject(new Error('السوكيت غير متصل'));
                    return;
                }
                
                socket.emit('ms::createRecvTransport', { channelId: roomId }, (response) => {
                    if (response && response.id && !response.error) {
                        if (!window.p) window.p = {};
                        
                        window.p.recvTransport = {
                            id: response.id,
                            closed: false,
                            close: function() { 
                                this.closed = true; 
                            }
                        };
                        
                        resolve(response);
                    } else {
                        reject(new Error(response?.error || 'فشل إنشاء النقل'));
                    }
                });
            });
        },
        
        reconnect: function() {
            console.log('[AudioManager] 🔄 محاولة إعادة اتصال');
            this.cleanup();
            return this.initialize();
        },
        
        cleanup: function() {
            console.log('[AudioManager] 🧹 تنظيف اتصالات الصوت');
            
            if (window.p && window.p.recvTransport && !window.p.recvTransport.closed) {
                try {
                    window.p.recvTransport.close();
                } catch (e) {
                    console.error('[AudioManager] خطأ في إغلاق نقل الاستقبال:', e);
                }
                window.p.recvTransport = null;
            }
            
            this.isInitialized = false;
        }
    };
}

// ==================== إنشاء audio manager أساسي إذا لم يكن موجوداً ====================
if (typeof window.audioManager === 'undefined') {
  console.log('[AudioManager] Creating basic audio manager fallback');
  window.audioManager = {
    pause: function() {
      console.log('[AudioManager] Fallback pause called');
      const audioElements = document.querySelectorAll('audio, video');
      audioElements.forEach(element => {
        try {
          element.pause();
        } catch (e) {
          console.error('[AudioManager] Error pausing element:', e);
        }
      });
    },
    resume: function() {
      console.log('[AudioManager] Fallback resume called');
    },
    isActive: function() {
      return window.isAudioFullyConnected ? window.isAudioFullyConnected() : false;
    },
    isGloballyMuted: function() {
      try {
        return sessionStorage.getItem('audio_global_muted_backup') === 'true' || 
               localStorage.getItem('globalMuteState') === 'true';
      } catch (e) {
        return false;
      }
    },
    setGlobalMute: function(muteState) {
      try {
        sessionStorage.setItem('audio_global_muted_backup', String(muteState));
        localStorage.setItem('globalMuteState', String(muteState));
      } catch (e) {
        console.error('[AudioManager] Error setting global mute:', e);
      }
    }
  };
}

// ==================== دوال مساعدة للتطوير - Mic Settings Debug Tools ====================

/**
 * التحقق من حالة المايكات الحالية (للتطوير)
 */
window.debugMicStates = function() {
  console.log('═══════════════════════════════════════');
  console.log('🔍 حالة المايكات الحالية');
  console.log('═══════════════════════════════════════');
  
  console.log('📊 عدد المايكات:', window.mic_count);
  console.log('🎖️ رتبة المايك:', window.mic_rank);
  console.log('🏠 معرف الغرفة:', window.user_room || window.M || window.room_id);
  
  // حفظ الحالة الحالية لعرضها
  const activeMics = {};
  for (let i = 1; i <= 20; i++) {
    const micElement = document.getElementById(`mic${i}`);
    if (!micElement) continue;
    
    const avatarImg = micElement.querySelector('.avatar img, img[id*="avatar"]');
    const usernameElement = micElement.querySelector('.username, .user-name, [class*="name"]');
    const seatData = window.h && window.h.seats ? window.h.seats[i] : null;
    
    if (seatData || (avatarImg && avatarImg.src && avatarImg.src !== '')) {
      activeMics[i] = {
        user_id: seatData?.user_id || 'unknown',
        user_name: seatData?.user_name || usernameElement?.textContent || 'unknown',
        avatar: avatarImg?.src || 'none',
        is_muted: seatData?.isMuted || false,
        producerId: seatData?.producerId || 'none',
        element_exists: !!micElement,
        avatar_img_exists: !!avatarImg,
        username_element_exists: !!usernameElement
      };
    }
  }
  
  console.log('🎤 المايكات النشطة:', activeMics);
  console.log('📦 عدد المايكات النشطة:', Object.keys(activeMics).length);
  
  if (window.h && window.h.seats) {
    console.log('💾 window.h.seats:', window.h.seats);
  }
  
  if (window.persistentState) {
    console.log('💾 persistentState:', window.persistentState);
  }
  
  console.log('═══════════════════════════════════════');
  
  return activeMics;
};

/**
 * فحص عناصر DOM للمايكات (للتشخيص)
 */
window.checkMicElements = function(micCount) {
  const count = micCount || window.mic_count || 10;
  console.log(`[MicCheck] 🔍 فحص عناصر DOM للمايكات (1-${count})...`);
  
  for (let i = 1; i <= count; i++) {
    const micElement = document.getElementById(`mic${i}`);
    if (!micElement) {
      console.warn(`[MicCheck] ❌ المايك ${i}: العنصر غير موجود`);
      continue;
    }
    
    const avatarImg = micElement.querySelector('.avatar img, img[id*="avatar"]');
    const usernameElement = micElement.querySelector('.username, .user-name, [class*="name"]');
    
    console.log(`[MicCheck] ✅ المايك ${i}:`, {
      element: !!micElement,
      visible: micElement.style.display !== 'none',
      avatar_img: !!avatarImg,
      avatar_src: avatarImg?.src || 'none',
      username_element: !!usernameElement,
      username: usernameElement?.textContent || 'none',
      classes: micElement.className
    });
  }
};

/**
 * إعادة تطبيق المستخدمين يدوياً (للطوارئ)
 */
window.reapplyMicUsers = function() {
  console.log('[MicDebug] 🔄 إعادة تطبيق المستخدمين يدوياً...');
  
  // حفظ الحالة
  const savedStates = {};
  for (let i = 1; i <= 20; i++) {
    const micElement = document.getElementById(`mic${i}`);
    if (!micElement) continue;
    
    const avatarImg = micElement.querySelector('.avatar img, img[id*="avatar"]');
    const usernameElement = micElement.querySelector('.username, .user-name, [class*="name"]');
    const seatData = window.h && window.h.seats ? window.h.seats[i] : null;
    
    if (seatData || (avatarImg && avatarImg.src && avatarImg.src !== '')) {
      savedStates[i] = {
        micId: i,
        user_id: seatData?.user_id || null,
        user_name: seatData?.user_name || usernameElement?.textContent || null,
        avatar: avatarImg?.src || null,
        is_muted: seatData?.isMuted || false,
        producerId: seatData?.producerId || null
      };
    }
  }
  
  console.log('[MicDebug] 💾 تم حفظ', Object.keys(savedStates).length, 'مايك');
  
  // استعادة بعد تأخير قصير
  setTimeout(() => {
    Object.keys(savedStates).forEach(micId => {
      const state = savedStates[micId];
      const micNum = parseInt(micId);
      const micElement = document.getElementById(`mic${micNum}`);
      
      if (!micElement) return;
      
      // استعادة الصورة
      if (state.avatar) {
        const avatarImg = micElement.querySelector('.avatar img, img[id*="avatar"]');
        if (avatarImg) {
          avatarImg.src = state.avatar;
          avatarImg.style.display = '';
        }
      }
      
      // استعادة الاسم
      if (state.user_name) {
        const usernameElement = micElement.querySelector('.username, .user-name, [class*="name"]');
        if (usernameElement) {
          usernameElement.textContent = state.user_name;
        }
      }
      
      // استعادة أيقونة الكتم
      if (state.is_muted) {
        const muteIcon = document.getElementById(`muteIcon${micNum}`);
        if (muteIcon) {
          muteIcon.classList.add('show');
          muteIcon.style.display = 'block';
        }
      }
      
      micElement.classList.add('active', 'occupied');
      
      console.log(`[MicDebug] ✅ تمت استعادة مايك ${micNum}`);
    });
    
    console.log('[MicDebug] ✅ تمت إعادة تطبيق جميع المستخدمين');
    
    // طلب المزامنة من السيرفر
    const socket = window.msio || window.S;
    if (socket && socket.connected) {
      const roomId = window.user_room || window.M || window.room_id;
      if (roomId) {
        socket.emit('ms::getMicStatus', { channelId: roomId }, (response) => {
          if (response && response.micStatus) {
            console.log('[MicDebug] 📥 حالة من السيرفر:', response.micStatus);
          }
        });
      }
    }
  }, 100);
};

/**
 * اختبار سريع للنظام
 */
window.testMicPreservation = function() {
  console.log('═══════════════════════════════════════');
  console.log('🧪 اختبار نظام الحفاظ على المستخدمين');
  console.log('═══════════════════════════════════════');
  
  const currentCount = window.mic_count;
  console.log('📊 عدد المايكات الحالي:', currentCount);
  
  // فحص العناصر قبل التحديث
  console.log('\n📋 فحص العناصر قبل التحديث:');
  window.checkMicElements(currentCount);
  
  const activeBefore = window.debugMicStates();
  console.log('✅ المايكات النشطة قبل التحديث:', Object.keys(activeBefore).length);
  
  // محاكاة تحديث عدد المايكات
  const newCount = currentCount === 4 ? 8 : 4;
  console.log('\n🔄 تحديث إلى', newCount, 'مايك...');
  
  // استدعاء التحديث
  if (window.saveAndRestoreMicStates) {
    const savedStates = window.saveAndRestoreMicStates(newCount);
    
    // فحص بعد 1 ثانية
    setTimeout(() => {
      console.log('\n📋 فحص العناصر بعد التحديث:');
      window.checkMicElements(newCount);
      
      const activeAfter = window.debugMicStates();
      console.log('✅ المايكات النشطة بعد التحديث:', Object.keys(activeAfter).length);
      
      // مقارنة تفصيلية
      console.log('\n📊 المقارنة:');
      console.log('قبل:', Object.keys(activeBefore));
      console.log('بعد:', Object.keys(activeAfter));
      
      let success = true;
      Object.keys(activeBefore).forEach(micId => {
        const before = activeBefore[micId];
        const after = activeAfter[micId];
        
        if (!after) {
          console.error(`❌ المايك ${micId} اختفى!`, before);
          success = false;
        } else if (before.user_id !== after.user_id) {
          console.error(`❌ المايك ${micId} تغير المستخدم!`, {before: before.user_id, after: after.user_id});
          success = false;
        } else {
          console.log(`✅ المايك ${micId} سليم`);
        }
      });
      
      if (success && Object.keys(activeBefore).length === Object.keys(activeAfter).length) {
        console.log('\n✅ ✅ ✅ النظام يعمل بشكل صحيح!');
      } else {
        console.warn('\n⚠️ ⚠️ ⚠️ هناك مشكلة - راجع التفاصيل أعلاه');
      }
      
      console.log('═══════════════════════════════════════');
    }, 1500); // زيادة الوقت إلى 1.5 ثانية
  } else {
    console.error('❌ دالة saveAndRestoreMicStates غير موجودة');
  }
};


// ==================== تنظيف شامل عند إغلاق الصفحة ====================
window.addEventListener('beforeunload', function() {
  
  window.cleanupAllIntervals();
  
  if (window.completeRoomCleanup) {
    window.completeRoomCleanup(window.user_room);
  }
  
  const socket = window.msio || window.S;
  if (socket && socket.connected) {
    socket.disconnect();
  }
});

window.addEventListener('pagehide', function() {
  window.cleanupAllIntervals();
});/**
 * VeroSDK 2.4.28 copryright vero.io 
 */
 // في بداية دالة j (قبل navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia) أضف:
async function getUserMediaWithPreferences() {
    const savedDeviceId = localStorage.getItem('audio_device_id') || '';
    const savedChannelCount = parseInt(localStorage.getItem('audio_channel_count') || '1');
    const savedSampleRate = parseInt(localStorage.getItem('audio_sample_rate') || '48000');
    const savedEchoCancellation = localStorage.getItem('audio_echo_cancellation') !== 'false';
    const savedNoiseSuppression = localStorage.getItem('audio_noise_suppression') !== 'false';
    const savedAutoGainControl = localStorage.getItem('audio_auto_gain_control') !== 'false';
    
    console.log('[MicSettings] Using saved preferences:', {
        deviceId: savedDeviceId,
        channelCount: savedChannelCount,
        sampleRate: savedSampleRate,
        echoCancellation: savedEchoCancellation,
        noiseSuppression: savedNoiseSuppression,
        autoGainControl: savedAutoGainControl
    });
    
    const constraints = {
        video: false,
        audio: {
            channelCount: savedChannelCount,
            sampleRate: savedSampleRate,
            echoCancellation: savedEchoCancellation,
            noiseSuppression: savedNoiseSuppression,
            autoGainControl: savedAutoGainControl
        }
    };
    
    if (savedDeviceId) {
        constraints.audio.deviceId = { exact: savedDeviceId };
    }
    
    try {
        return await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia(constraints);
    } catch (error) {
        console.warn('[MicSettings] Failed with saved preferences, trying default:', error);
        // Fallback to default settings
        return await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({
            video: false,
            audio: true
        });
    }
}

// دالة لإعادة تطبيق الإعدادات الجديدة على المايكروفون النشط
async function applyMicrophoneSettings() {
    console.log('[MicSettings] ====================================');
    console.log('[MicSettings] Applying new microphone settings...');
    console.log('[MicSettings] ====================================');
    
    // التحقق من وجود مايكروفون نشط
    if (!window.g) {
        console.log('[MicSettings] No active microphone (window.g is null)');
        if (window.showNotify) {
            window.showNotify('لا يوجد مايكروفون نشط حالياً', 'warning');
        }
        return false;
    }
    
    const currentMicSlot = window.g;
    console.log('[MicSettings] Current mic slot:', currentMicSlot);
    
    // التحقق من وجود p object
    if (!window.p) {
        console.log('[MicSettings] window.p not found');
        if (window.showNotify) {
            window.showNotify('خطأ في نظام المايكروفون', 'error');
        }
        return false;
    }
    
    // التحقق من وجود producer
    if (!window.p.producer) {
        console.log('[MicSettings] No active producer found');
        if (window.showNotify) {
            window.showNotify('لا يوجد اتصال نشط بالمايكروفون', 'warning');
        }
        return false;
    }
    
    try {
        // حفظ حالة الميوت الحالية
        const wasMuted = window.w || false;
        const wasPaused = window.p.producer.paused;
        console.log('[MicSettings] Current state - Muted:', wasMuted, 'Paused:', wasPaused);
        
        // إيقاف stream الحالي
        if (window.p.localStream) {
            console.log('[MicSettings] Stopping current stream...');
            window.p.localStream.getTracks().forEach(track => {
                console.log('[MicSettings] Stopping track:', track.kind, track.label);
                track.stop();
            });
            window.p.localStream = null;
        }
        
        // إغلاق producer الحالي
        if (window.p.producer) {
            console.log('[MicSettings] Closing current producer...');
            window.p.producer.close();
            window.p.producer = null;
        }
        
        // الحصول على stream جديد بالإعدادات المحدثة
        console.log('[MicSettings] Getting new media stream with saved preferences...');
        const newStream = await getUserMediaWithPreferences();
        
        if (!newStream || newStream.getAudioTracks().length === 0) {
            throw new Error('Failed to get new audio stream');
        }
        
        const audioTrack = newStream.getAudioTracks()[0];
        console.log('[MicSettings] New audio track:', {
            label: audioTrack.label,
            settings: audioTrack.getSettings()
        });
        
        window.p.localStream = newStream;
        
        // التحقق من وجود sendTransport
        if (!window.p.sendTransport || window.p.sendTransport.closed) {
            throw new Error('Send transport not available or closed');
        }
        
        console.log('[MicSettings] Creating new producer...');
        
        // قراءة إعداد stereo من localStorage
        const channelCount = parseInt(localStorage.getItem('audio_channel_count') || '1');
        const opusStereo = channelCount === 2 ? 1 : 0;
        
        console.log('[MicSettings] Using codec options:', {
            opusStereo: opusStereo,
            channelCount: channelCount
        });
        
        // إنشاء producer جديد
        window.p.producer = await window.p.sendTransport.produce({
            track: audioTrack,
            codecOptions: {
                opusStereo: opusStereo,
                opusDtx: 1,
                opusFec: 1
            }
        });
        
        console.log('[MicSettings] New producer created:', window.p.producer.id);
        
        // إعادة تطبيق event listeners
        window.p.producer.on("transportclose", () => {
            console.log("[MicSettings] Producer transport closed");
            window.p.producer = null;
        });
        
        window.p.producer.on("trackended", () => {
            console.log("[MicSettings] Producer track ended");
            window.p.producer = null;
        });
        
        // إعادة تطبيق حالة الميوت
        if (wasMuted || wasPaused) {
            console.log('[MicSettings] Reapplying mute state...');
            window.p.producer.pause();
            window.w = true;
        }
        
        console.log('[MicSettings] ====================================');
        console.log('[MicSettings] ✓ Settings applied successfully!');
        console.log('[MicSettings] ====================================');
        
        // إشعار المستخدم
        if (window.showNotify) {
            window.showNotify('تم تطبيق إعدادات المايكروفون بنجاح', 'success');
        }
        
        return true;
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('[MicSettings] ====================================');
        console.error('[MicSettings] ✗ Failed to apply settings:', error);
        console.error('[MicSettings] ====================================');
        
        if (window.showNotify) {
            window.showNotify('فشل تطبيق الإعدادات: ' + error.message, 'error');
        }
        
        return false;
    }
}

// جعل الدالة متاحة عالمياً
window.applyMicrophoneSettings = applyMicrophoneSettings;
!function() {
    "use strict";
    const t = "room_"

            !0)
        },
        canChangeState: function() {
            const t = Date.now();
            return !(t - this.lastStateChange < 2e3) && (this.lastStateChange = t,
            !0)
        }
    };
    function r(t) {
        C("[BigGift] Showing big gift:", t);
        const e = document.getElementById("bigGiftOverlay");
        if (!e)
            return void C("[BigGift] Overlay element not found!");
        const i = e.querySelector(".big-gift-card");
        if (!i)
            return void C("[BigGift] Card element not found!");
        const n = document.getElementById("bigGiftImage")
          , o = document.getElementById("bigGiftSender")
          , s = document.getElementById("bigGiftTitle")
          , a = document.getElementById("bigGiftValue").querySelector("span")
          , r = document.getElementById("bigGiftReceiver")
          , c = document.getElementById("bigGiftQuantity")
          , d = t.total_cost || t.gift_cost * (t.quantity || 1);
        n.src = `gift/${t.gift_image}`,
        o.textContent = t.sender_name,
        s.textContent = t.gift_title,
        a.textContent = d.toLocaleString(),
        t.quantity && t.quantity > 1 ? (c.textContent = `x${t.quantity}`,
        c.style.display = "inline-block") : c.style.display = "none";
        let l = "Player";
        if (window.battleProgress && window.battleProgress.players) {
            const e = window.battleProgress.players.find((e => e.id == t.target_player_id));
            e && (l = e.name)
        }
        r.textContent = `â†’ ${l}`,
        e.classList.add("active"),
        setTimeout(( () => {
            i.classList.add("show")
        }
        ), 50),
        function() {
            const t = document.getElementById("bigGiftParticles")
              , e = 50;
            for (let i = 0; i < e; i++) {
                const n = document.createElement("div");
                n.className = "gift-particle";
                const o = 2 * Math.PI * i / e
                  , s = 50 + 100 * Math.random()
                  , a = Math.cos(o) * s + window.innerWidth / 2
                  , r = Math.sin(o) * s + window.innerHeight / 2;
                n.style.left = a + "px",
                n.style.top = r + "px",
                n.style.setProperty("--x-offset", 400 * (Math.random() - .5) + "px"),
                n.style.animationDelay = .5 * Math.random() + "s";
                const c = ["#ffd700", "#ff6b6b", "#4facfe", "#a8edea", "#fed6e3"];
                n.style.background = c[Math.floor(Math.random() * c.length)],
                t.appendChild(n)
            }
        }(),
        function() {
            const t = document.getElementById("bigGiftSparkles")
              , e = 30;
            for (let i = 0; i < e; i++) {
                const e = document.createElement("div");
                e.className = "sparkle",
                e.style.left = 100 * Math.random() + "%",
                e.style.top = 100 * Math.random() + "%",
                e.style.setProperty("--sparkle-x", 200 * (Math.random() - .5) + "px"),
                e.style.setProperty("--sparkle-y", 200 * (Math.random() - .5) + "px"),
                e.style.animationDelay = 2 * Math.random() + "s",
                t.appendChild(e)
            }
        }(),
        setTimeout(( () => {
            i.classList.remove("show"),
            setTimeout(( () => {
                e.classList.remove("active");
                const t = document.getElementById("bigGiftParticles")
                  , i = document.getElementById("bigGiftSparkles");
                t && (t.innerHTML = ""),
                i && (i.innerHTML = "")
            }
            ), 300)
        }
        ), 4e3)
    }
    function c() {
        let t = document.getElementById("entry-notification-container");
        t || (t = document.createElement("div"),
        t.id = "entry-notification-container",
        document.body.appendChild(t),
        C("[EntryNotification] Container created"));
        const e = d();
        return t.style.cssText = `\n\t\t\tposition: absolute;\n\t\t\tz-index: 9;\n\t\t\ttop: ${e}px;\n\t\t\tleft: 0;\n\t\t\tright: 0;\n\t\t\twidth: 100%;\n\t\t\tdisplay: flex;\n\t\t\tjustify-content: center;\n\t\t\tpointer-events: none;\n\t\t\toverflow: hidden;\n\t\t\ttransition: top 0.3s ease;\n\t\t`,
        t
    }
    function d() {
        let t = 60;
        const e = document.getElementById("room_mic_ui")
          , i = e && "none" !== e.style.display && e.offsetHeight > 0 && "none" !== window.getComputedStyle(e).display
          , n = document.getElementById("battleProgressBar");
        if (n && "none" !== n.style.display && n.offsetHeight > 0 && "none" !== window.getComputedStyle(n).display) {
            t = n.offsetTop + n.offsetHeight + 25,
            C("[EntryNotification] Positioning below battle UI at:", t)
        } else if (i) {
            t = e.offsetTop + e.offsetHeight + 25,
            C("[EntryNotification] Positioning below mic UI at:", t)
        } else
            t = 60,
            C("[EntryNotification] Using default position (no UI visible) at:", t);
        return t
    }
    function l(t, o, s, a) {
        if (function(t) {
            const n = `entry_${t}_`;
            for (let t of e)
                if (t.startsWith(n)) {
                    const n = parseInt(t.split("_")[2]);
                    if (Date.now() - n < i)
                        return !0;
                    e.delete(t)
                }
            return !1
        }(t))
            return void C("[EntryNotification] Skipping duplicate for:", t);
        n(t);
        const r = c()
          , l = document.createElement("div");
        l.className = "entry-notification-slide-in",
        l.style.cssText = "\n\t\t\tdisplay: flex;\n\t\t\tjustify-content: center;\n\t\t\tmargin-bottom: 10px;\n\t\t\twidth: fit-content;\n\t\t\tmargin-left: auto;\n\t\t\tmargin-right: auto;\n\t\t";
        const u = a ? "" : '<span style="flex-shrink: 0;">Ø§Ù†Ø¶Ù… Ø§Ù„Ù‰ Ø§Ù„ØºØ±ÙØ©</span>';
        l.innerHTML = `\n\t\t\t<div style="position: relative; display: inline-block;">\n\t\t\t\t<img src="default_images/assets/entry/${o}" style="display: block;">\n\t\t\t\t<span class="${s}">\n\t\t\t\t\t<span style="overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; min-width: 0;">${t}</span>\n\t\t\t\t\t${u}\n\t\t\t\t</span>\n\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t`,
        r.appendChild(l),
        setTimeout(( () => {
            l.parentNode && (l.classList.remove("entry-notification-slide-in"),
            l.classList.add("entry-notification-slide-out"),
            setTimeout(( () => {
                if (l.parentNode && l.parentNode.removeChild(l),
                0 === r.children.length) {
                    const t = d();
                    r.style.top = t + "px"
                }
            }
            ), 500))
        }
        ), 5e3),
        C("[EntryNotification] Shown for:", t)
    }
    window.RPSGame = new class {
        constructor() {
            this.currentGame = null,
            this.currentInvite = null,
            this.inviteTimer = null,
            this.init()
        }
        init() {
            if (!document.getElementById("rpsGameModal")) {
                const t = '\n\t\t\t\t<div id="rpsGameModal" class="mic-modal-overlay" style="display: none;">\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="mic-modal-container rps-game-container">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="mic-modal-header">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<h3 id="rpsGameTitle">Rock Paper Scissors</h3>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="xo-header-controls">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<button class="xo-minimize-btn" onclick="RPSGame.toggleMinimize()" title="Minimize">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<i class="fa fa-minus" id="rpsMinimizeIcon"></i>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t</button>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<button class="mic-modal-close" onclick="RPSGame.close()">&times;</button>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="mic-modal-content" id="rpsGameContent">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<div id="rpsGameBody" class="rps-game-body">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\x3c!-- Game content here --\x3e\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\n\t\t\t\t<div id="rpsInviteModal" class="mic-modal-overlay" style="display: none;">\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="mic-modal-container rps-invite-container">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="mic-modal-header">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<h3>ðŸŽ® RPS Challenge</h3>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<button class="mic-modal-close" onclick="RPSGame.closeInvite()">&times;</button>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="mic-modal-content">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-invite-content">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-invite-text">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<p><strong id="rpsInviteUserName">User</strong> challenged you!</p>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<p class="rps-invite-bet">Bet: <span id="rpsInviteBet">100</span> points</p>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<p class="rps-invite-rounds">Best of <span id="rpsInviteRounds">1</span></p>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<p class="rps-invite-timer">Expires in: <span id="rpsInviteTimer">30</span>s</p>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-invite-actions">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<button class="mic-btn mic-btn-success" onclick="RPSGame.acceptInvite()">Accept</button>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<button class="mic-btn mic-btn-danger" onclick="RPSGame.declineInvite()">Decline</button>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t';
                document.body.insertAdjacentHTML("beforeend", t)
            }
            this.setupSocketListeners()
        }
        setupSocketListeners() {
            window.msio ? (window.msio.off("rps_invite_received"),
            window.msio.off("rps_invite_declined"),
            window.msio.off("rps_invite_expired"),
            window.msio.off("rps_game_started"),
            window.msio.off("rps_opponent_chose"),
            window.msio.off("rps_round_result"),
            window.msio.off("rps_next_round"),
            window.msio.off("rps_game_over"),
            window.msio.on("rps_invite_received", (t => {
                this.showInvite(t)
            }
            )),
            window.msio.on("rps_invite_declined", (t => {
                showNotify(`${t.declined_by} declined your challenge`, "warning")
            }
            )),
            window.msio.on("rps_invite_expired", (t => {
                this.closeInvite(),
                showNotify("Challenge expired", "warning")
            }
            )),
            window.msio.on("rps_game_started", (t => {
                this.closeInvite(),
                this.startGame(t)
            }
            )),
            window.msio.on("rps_opponent_chose", (t => {
                this.opponentChose()
            }
            )),
            window.msio.on("rps_round_result", (t => {
                this.showRoundResult(t)
            }
            )),
            window.msio.on("rps_next_round", (t => {
                this.nextRound(t)
            }
            )),
            window.msio.on("rps_game_over", (t => {
                setTimeout(( () => {
                    this.gameOver(t)
                }
                ), 200)
            }
            ))) : setTimeout(( () => this.setupSocketListeners()), 1e3)
        }
        showInvite(t) {
            this.currentInvite = t,
            document.getElementById("rpsInviteUserName").textContent = t.from_user_name,
            document.getElementById("rpsInviteBet").textContent = t.bet_amount,
            document.getElementById("rpsInviteRounds").textContent = t.max_rounds;
            let e = 30;
            this.updateInviteTimer(e),
            this.inviteTimer = setInterval(( () => {
                e--,
                this.updateInviteTimer(e),
                e <= 0 && this.closeInvite()
            }
            ), 1e3),
            document.body.classList.add("modal-open"),
            document.getElementById("rpsInviteModal").style.display = "flex"
        }
        updateInviteTimer(t) {
            const e = document.getElementById("rpsInviteTimer");
            e.textContent = t,
            e.style.color = t <= 10 ? "#ff6b6b" : "#55f370"
        }
        closeInvite() {
            this.inviteTimer && (clearInterval(this.inviteTimer),
            this.inviteTimer = null),
            this.currentInvite = null,
            document.getElementById("rpsInviteModal").style.display = "none",
            document.body.classList.remove("modal-open")
        }
        acceptInvite() {
            this.currentInvite && window.msio.emit("rps_invite_response", {
                invite_id: this.currentInvite.invite_id,
                accepted: !0
            }, (t => {
                t && t.error && (showNotify(t.error, "error"),
                this.closeInvite())
            }
            ))
        }
        declineInvite() {
            this.currentInvite && (window.msio.emit("rps_invite_response", {
                invite_id: this.currentInvite.invite_id,
                accepted: !1
            }),
            this.closeInvite())
        }
        startGame(t) {
            this.currentGame = {
                game_id: t.game_id,
                opponent_name: t.opponent_name,
                bet_amount: t.bet_amount,
                max_rounds: t.max_rounds,
                current_round: 1,
                my_score: 0,
                opponent_score: 0,
                my_choice: null,
                opponent_chose: !1
            },
            this.renderGame(),
            document.body.classList.add("modal-open"),
            document.getElementById("rpsGameModal").style.display = "flex",
            showNotify("Game started! Make your choice", "success")
        }
        renderGame() {
            const t = `Round ${this.currentGame.current_round}/${this.currentGame.max_rounds}`;
            document.getElementById("rpsGameTitle").textContent = t;
            const e = `\n\t\t\t<div class="rps-game-info">\n\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-scores">\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-score-item">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<span class="rps-score-label">You</span>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<span class="rps-score-value">${this.currentGame.my_score}</span>\n\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-score-divider">vs</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-score-item">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<span class="rps-score-label">${this.currentGame.opponent_name}</span>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<span class="rps-score-value">${this.currentGame.opponent_score}</span>\n\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-bet-display">\n\t\t\t\t\t<i class="fa fa-trophy"></i> ${this.currentGame.bet_amount} points\n\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\n\t\t\t<div class="rps-choices" id="rpsChoices">\n\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-choice ${"rock" === this.currentGame.my_choice ? "selected" : ""}" \n\t\t\t\t\t onclick="RPSGame.makeChoice('rock')" data-choice="rock">\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-choice-icon">âœŠ</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-choice-name">Rock</div>\n\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-choice ${"paper" === this.currentGame.my_choice ? "selected" : ""}" \n\t\t\t\t\t onclick="RPSGame.makeChoice('paper')" data-choice="paper">\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-choice-icon">âœ‹</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-choice-name">Paper</div>\n\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-choice ${"scissors" === this.currentGame.my_choice ? "selected" : ""}" \n\t\t\t\t\t onclick="RPSGame.makeChoice('scissors')" data-choice="scissors">\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-choice-icon">âœŒï¸</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-choice-name">Scissors</div>\n\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\n\t\t\t<div class="rps-status" id="rpsStatus">\n\t\t\t\t${this.currentGame.my_choice ? this.currentGame.opponent_chose ? "Waiting for reveal..." : "Waiting for opponent..." : "Choose your move!"}\n\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\n\t\t\t<div class="rps-game-actions">\n\t\t\t\t<button class="mic-btn mic-btn-danger" onclick="RPSGame.forfeit()">\n\t\t\t\t\t<i class="fa fa-flag"></i> Forfeit\n\t\t\t\t</button>\n\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t`;
            document.getElementById("rpsGameBody").innerHTML = e
        }
        makeChoice(t) {
            this.currentGame.my_choice ? showNotify("You already made your choice!", "warning") : (this.currentGame.my_choice = t,
            this.renderGame(),
            window.msio.emit("rps_submit_choice", {
                game_id: this.currentGame.game_id,
                choice: t
            }, (t => {
                t && t.error && (showNotify(t.error, "error"),
                this.currentGame.my_choice = null,
                this.renderGame())
            }
            )))
        }
        opponentChose() {
            this.currentGame.opponent_chose = !0,
            this.renderGame()
        }
        showRoundResult(t) {
            const e = t.player1_choice || t.player2_choice
              , i = t.player1_choice === e ? t.player2_choice : t.player1_choice;
            this.currentGame.my_score = t.player1_score,
            this.currentGame.opponent_score = t.player2_score;
            const n = t.round_winner;
            let o = ""
              , s = "";
            n ? n == user_id ? (o = "You Win This Round!",
            s = "win") : (o = "You Lose This Round",
            s = "lose") : (o = "It's a Draw!",
            s = "draw");
            const a = {
                rock: "âœŠ",
                paper: "âœ‹",
                scissors: "âœŒï¸"
            }
              , r = `\n\t\t\t<div class="rps-game-info">\n\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-scores">\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-score-item">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<span class="rps-score-label">You</span>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<span class="rps-score-value">${this.currentGame.my_score}</span>\n\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-score-divider">vs</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-score-item">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<span class="rps-score-label">${this.currentGame.opponent_name}</span>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<span class="rps-score-value">${this.currentGame.opponent_score}</span>\n\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\n\t\t\t<div class="rps-result-reveal">\n\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-reveal-choice">\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-reveal-label">You chose</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-reveal-icon">${a[e]}</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-reveal-name">${e}</div>\n\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-reveal-vs">VS</div>\n\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-reveal-choice">\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-reveal-label">Opponent chose</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-reveal-icon">${a[i]}</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-reveal-name">${i}</div>\n\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\n\t\t\t<div class="rps-round-result ${s}">\n\t\t\t\t${o}\n\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t`;
            document.getElementById("rpsGameBody").innerHTML = r
        }
        nextRound(t) {
            this.currentGame.current_round = t.round,
            this.currentGame.my_choice = null,
            this.currentGame.opponent_chose = !1,
            showNotify(`Round ${t.round} - Make your choice!`, "info"),
            this.renderGame()
        }
        gameOver(t) {
            const e = "win" === t.result || "draw" === t.result
              , i = () => {
                let e = ""
                  , i = "";
                "draw" === t.result ? (e = "Draw",
                i = `\n\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-result-screen rps-draw">\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-sparkles"></div>\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-result-icon">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<i class="fa fa-handshake-o"></i>\n\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t<h2>It's a Draw!</h2>\n\t\t\t\t\t<p class="rps-result-message">Final Score: ${t.player1_score} - ${t.player2_score}</p>\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-result-amount">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<i class="fa fa-refresh"></i>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<span>Bet Refunded: ${this.currentGame.bet_amount} points</span>\n\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t`) : "forfeit" === t.result ? t.winner_id == user_id ? (e = "Victory!",
                i = `\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-result-screen rps-win">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-sparkles"></div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-result-icon">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<i class="fa fa-trophy"></i>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<h2>You Win!</h2>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<p class="rps-result-message">${t.loser_name} forfeited</p>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-result-amount rps-win-amount">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<i class="fa fa-plus-circle"></i>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<span>+${t.winnings} points</span>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t`) : (e = "Defeat",
                i = `\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-result-screen rps-lose">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-result-icon">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<i class="fa fa-flag"></i>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<h2>You Forfeited</h2>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<p class="rps-result-message">Better luck next time</p>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-result-amount rps-lose-amount">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<i class="fa fa-minus-circle"></i>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<span>-${this.currentGame.bet_amount} points</span>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t`) : "opponent_disconnected" === t.result ? (e = "Victory!",
                i = `\n\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-result-screen rps-win">\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-sparkles"></div>\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-result-icon">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<i class="fa fa-trophy"></i>\n\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t<h2>You Win!</h2>\n\t\t\t\t\t<p class="rps-result-message">Opponent disconnected</p>\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-result-amount rps-win-amount">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<i class="fa fa-plus-circle"></i>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<span>+${t.winnings} points</span>\n\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t`) : t.winner_id == user_id ? (e = "Victory!",
                i = `\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-result-screen rps-win">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-sparkles"></div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-result-icon">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<i class="fa fa-trophy"></i>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<h2>You Win!</h2>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<p class="rps-result-message">Final Score: ${t.player1_score} - ${t.player2_score}</p>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-result-amount rps-win-amount">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<i class="fa fa-plus-circle"></i>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<span>+${t.winnings} points</span>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t`) : (e = "Defeat",
                i = `\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-result-screen rps-lose">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-result-icon">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<i class="fa fa-times-circle"></i>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<h2>You Lost</h2>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<p class="rps-result-message">Final Score: ${t.player1_score} - ${t.player2_score}</p>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="rps-result-amount rps-lose-amount">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<i class="fa fa-minus-circle"></i>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<span>-${this.currentGame.bet_amount} points</span>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t`),
                i += '\n\t\t\t<div class="rps-result-actions">\n\t\t\t\t<button class="mic-btn mic-btn-primary" onclick="RPSGame.close()">\n\t\t\t\t\t<i class="fa fa-check"></i> Close\n\t\t\t\t</button>\n\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t',
                document.getElementById("rpsGameBody").innerHTML = i,
                document.getElementById("rpsGameTitle").textContent = e,
                t.winner_id != user_id && "draw" !== t.result || setTimeout(( () => this.createSparkles()), 100)
            }
            ;
            e ? setTimeout(( () => {
                i()
            }
            ), 3500) : i()
        }
        createSparkles() {
            const t = document.querySelector(".rps-sparkles");
            if (t)
                for (let e = 0; e < 20; e++) {
                    const e = document.createElement("div");
                    e.className = "sparkle",
                    e.style.left = 100 * Math.random() + "%",
                    e.style.top = 100 * Math.random() + "%",
                    e.style.animationDelay = 2 * Math.random() + "s",
                    e.innerHTML = "âœ¨",
                    t.appendChild(e)
                }
        }
        forfeit() {
            confirm("Are you sure you want to forfeit? You will lose your bet.") && window.msio.emit("rps_forfeit", {
                game_id: this.currentGame.game_id
            })
        }
        toggleMinimize() {
            const t = document.querySelector(".rps-game-container")
              , e = document.getElementById("rpsGameContent")
              , i = document.getElementById("rpsMinimizeIcon")
              , n = document.getElementById("rpsGameModal");
            t.classList.contains("rps-minimized") ? (t.classList.remove("rps-minimized"),
            e.style.display = "block",
            i.className = "fa fa-minus",
            n.style.backgroundColor = "rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5)",
            n.style.pointerEvents = "all") : (t.classList.add("rps-minimized"),
            e.style.display = "none",
            i.className = "fa fa-plus",
            n.style.backgroundColor = "transparent",
            n.style.pointerEvents = "none",
            t.style.pointerEvents = "all")
        }
        close() {
            this.currentGame = null,
            document.getElementById("rpsGameModal").style.display = "none",
            document.body.classList.remove("modal-open")
        }
    }
    ;
    window.XOGame = new class {
        constructor() {
            this.currentGame = null,
            this.mySymbol = null,
            this.isMyTurn = !1,
            this.init()
        }
        init() {
            if (!document.getElementById("xoGameModal")) {
                const t = '\n\t\t\t\t\t<div id="xoGameModal" class="mic-modal-overlay" style="display: none;">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="mic-modal-container xo-game-container">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="mic-modal-header">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<h3 id="xoGameTitle">Tic-Tac-Toe</h3>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="xo-header-controls">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<button class="xo-minimize-btn" onclick="XOGame.toggleMinimize()" title="Minimize">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<i class="fa fa-minus" id="xoMinimizeIcon"></i>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t</button>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="mic-modal-content" id="xoGameContent">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<div id="xoGameBody" class="xo-game-body">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\x3c!-- Game content here --\x3e\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\n\t\t\t\t\t<div id="xoInviteModal" class="mic-modal-overlay" style="display: none;">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="mic-modal-container xo-invite-container">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="mic-modal-header">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<h3>ðŸŽ® Game Invitation</h3>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<button class="mic-modal-close" onclick="XOGame.closeInvite()">&times;</button>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="mic-modal-content">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="xo-invite-content">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="xo-invite-text">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<p><strong id="xoInviteUserName">User</strong> challenged you to Tic-Tac-Toe!</p>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<p class="xo-invite-bet">Bet Amount: <span id="xoInviteBet">100</span> points</p>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<p class="xo-invite-timer">Expires in: <span id="xoInviteTimer">30</span>s</p>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="xo-invite-actions">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<button class="mic-btn mic-btn-success" onclick="XOGame.acceptInvite()">Accept</button>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<button class="mic-btn mic-btn-danger" onclick="XOGame.declineInvite()">Decline</button>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t';
                document.body.insertAdjacentHTML("beforeend", t)
            }
            this.setupSocketListeners()
        }
        toggleMinimize() {
            const t = document.querySelector(".xo-game-container")
              , e = document.getElementById("xoGameContent")
              , i = document.getElementById("xoMinimizeIcon")
              , n = document.getElementById("xoGameModal");
            t.classList.contains("xo-minimized") ? (t.classList.remove("xo-minimized"),
            e.style.display = "block",
            i.className = "fa fa-minus",
            n.style.backgroundColor = "rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5)") : (t.classList.add("xo-minimized"),
            e.style.display = "none",
            i.className = "fa fa-plus",
            n.style.backgroundColor = "transparent",
            n.style.pointerEvents = "none",
            t.style.pointerEvents = "all")
        }
        setupSocketListeners() {
            window.msio ? (window.msio.off("xo_invite_received"),
            window.msio.off("xo_invite_declined"),
            window.msio.off("xo_invite_expired"),
            window.msio.off("xo_game_started"),
            window.msio.off("xo_opponent_moved"),
            window.msio.off("xo_game_over"),
            window.msio.on("xo_invite_received", (t => {
                console.log("[XO_GAME] Invite received:", t),
                this.showInvite(t)
            }
            )),
            window.msio.on("xo_invite_declined", (t => {
                console.log("[XO_GAME] Invite declined:", t),
                showNotify(`${t.declined_by} declined your game invitation`, "warning")
            }
            )),
            window.msio.on("xo_invite_expired", (t => {
                console.log("[XO_GAME] Invite expired:", t),
                this.closeInvite(),
                showNotify("Game invitation expired", "warning")
            }
            )),
            window.msio.on("xo_game_started", (t => {
                console.log("[XO_GAME] Game started:", t),
                this.closeInvite(),
                this.startGame(t)
            }
            )),
            window.msio.on("xo_opponent_moved", (t => {
                console.log("[XO_GAME] Opponent moved:", t),
                this.updateBoard(t)
            }
            )),
            window.msio.on("xo_game_over", (t => {
                console.log("[XO_GAME] !!!!! GAME OVER EVENT RECEIVED !!!!!", t),
                console.log("[XO_GAME] Current user_id:", user_id),
                console.log("[XO_GAME] Winner ID:", t.winner_id),
                console.log("[XO_GAME] Is winner?", t.winner_id == user_id),
                setTimeout(( () => {
                    this.gameOver(t)
                }
                ), 200)
            }
            )),
            console.log("[XO_GAME] Socket listeners set up successfully")) : setTimeout(( () => this.setupSocketListeners()), 1e3)
        }
        showInvite(t) {
            this.currentInvite = t,
            document.getElementById("xoInviteUserName").textContent = t.from_user_name,
            document.getElementById("xoInviteBet").textContent = t.bet_amount;
            let e = 30;
            this.updateInviteTimer(e),
            this.inviteTimer = setInterval(( () => {
                e--,
                this.updateInviteTimer(e),
                e <= 0 && this.closeInvite()
            }
            ), 1e3),
            document.body.classList.add("modal-open"),
            document.getElementById("xoInviteModal").style.display = "flex"
        }
        updateInviteTimer(t) {
            const e = document.getElementById("xoInviteTimer");
            e.textContent = t,
            e.style.color = t <= 10 ? "#ff6b6b" : "#55f370"
        }
        closeInvite() {
            this.inviteTimer && (clearInterval(this.inviteTimer),
            this.inviteTimer = null),
            this.currentInvite = null,
            document.getElementById("xoInviteModal").style.display = "none",
            document.body.classList.remove("modal-open")
        }
        acceptInvite() {
            this.currentInvite && window.msio.emit("xo_invite_response", {
                invite_id: this.currentInvite.invite_id,
                accepted: !0
            }, (t => {
                t && t.error && (showNotify(t.error, "error"),
                this.closeInvite())
            }
            ))
        }
        declineInvite() {
            this.currentInvite && (window.msio.emit("xo_invite_response", {
                invite_id: this.currentInvite.invite_id,
                accepted: !1
            }),
            this.closeInvite())
        }
        startGame(t) {
            this.currentGame = {
                game_id: t.game_id,
                my_symbol: t.your_symbol,
                opponent_name: t.opponent_name,
                bet_amount: t.bet_amount,
                board: Array(9).fill(null)
            },
            this.mySymbol = t.your_symbol,
            this.isMyTurn = t.your_turn,
            this.renderGame(),
            document.body.classList.add("modal-open"),
            document.getElementById("xoGameModal").style.display = "flex",
            showNotify(`Game started! You are ${this.mySymbol}`, "success")
        }
        renderGame() {
            const t = `Tic-Tac-Toe - You (${this.mySymbol}) vs ${this.currentGame.opponent_name}`;
            document.getElementById("xoGameTitle").textContent = t;
            const e = this.isMyTurn ? '<span style="color: #2ecc71;">Your Turn</span>' : '<span style="color: #e74c3c;">Opponent\'s Turn</span>'
              , i = `\n\t\t\t<div class="xo-game-info">\n\t\t\t\t<div class="xo-bet-display">\n\t\t\t\t\t<i class="fa fa-trophy"></i> Bet: ${this.currentGame.bet_amount} points\n\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t<div class="xo-turn-display">${e}</div>\n\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\n\t\t\t<div class="xo-board" id="xoBoard">\n\t\t\t\t${this.currentGame.board.map(( (t, e) => `\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="xo-cell ${t ? "filled" : ""}" \n\t\t\t\t\t\t data-position="${e}"\n\t\t\t\t\t\t onclick="XOGame.makeMove(${e})">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<span class="xo-mark ${"X" === t ? "xo-x" : "O" === t ? "xo-o" : ""}">${t || ""}</span>\n\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t`)).join("")}\n\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\n\t\t\t<div class="xo-game-actions">\n\t\t\t\t<button class="mic-btn mic-btn-danger" onclick="XOGame.forfeit()">\n\t\t\t\t\t<i class="fa fa-flag"></i> Forfeit\n\t\t\t\t</button>\n\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t`;
            document.getElementById("xoGameBody").innerHTML = i
        }
        makeMove(t) {
            this.isMyTurn ? null === this.currentGame.board[t] ? window.msio.emit("xo_make_move", {
                game_id: this.currentGame.game_id,
                position: t
            }, (t => {
                t && t.error ? showNotify(t.error, "error") : t && t.success && (this.currentGame.board = t.board,
                this.isMyTurn = t.your_turn,
                this.renderGame())
            }
            )) : showNotify("Cell already taken!", "warning") : showNotify("Not your turn!", "warning")
        }
        updateBoard(t) {
            this.currentGame.board = t.board,
            this.isMyTurn = t.your_turn,
            this.renderGame()
        }
        gameOver(t) {
            console.log("[XO_GAME] Game over received:", t);
            let e = ""
              , i = "";
            "draw" === t.result ? (i = "Draw",
            e = `\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="xo-result-screen xo-draw">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="xo-sparkles"></div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="xo-result-icon">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<i class="fa fa-handshake-o"></i>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<h2>It's a Draw!</h2>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<p class="xo-result-message">No winner this time</p>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="xo-result-amount">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<i class="fa fa-refresh"></i>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<span>Bet Refunded: ${this.currentGame.bet_amount} points</span>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t`) : "forfeit" === t.result ? t.winner_id == user_id ? (i = "Victory!",
            e = `\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="xo-result-screen xo-win">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="xo-sparkles"></div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="xo-result-icon">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<i class="fa fa-trophy"></i>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<h2>You Win!</h2>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<p class="xo-result-message">${t.loser_name} forfeited</p>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="xo-result-amount xo-win-amount">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<i class="fa fa-plus-circle"></i>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<span>+${t.winnings} points</span>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t`) : (i = "Defeat",
            e = `\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="xo-result-screen xo-lose">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="xo-result-icon">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<i class="fa fa-flag"></i>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<h2>You Forfeited</h2>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<p class="xo-result-message">Better luck next time</p>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="xo-result-amount xo-lose-amount">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<i class="fa fa-minus-circle"></i>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<span>-${this.currentGame.bet_amount} points</span>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t`) : "opponent_disconnected" === t.result ? (i = "Victory!",
            e = `\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="xo-result-screen xo-win">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="xo-sparkles"></div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="xo-result-icon">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<i class="fa fa-trophy"></i>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<h2>You Win!</h2>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<p class="xo-result-message">Opponent disconnected</p>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="xo-result-amount xo-win-amount">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<i class="fa fa-plus-circle"></i>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<span>+${t.winnings} points</span>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t`) : t.winner_id == user_id ? (i = "Victory!",
            e = `\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="xo-result-screen xo-win">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="xo-sparkles"></div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="xo-result-icon">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<i class="fa fa-trophy"></i>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<h2>You Win!</h2>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<p class="xo-result-message">You defeated ${t.loser_name}</p>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="xo-result-amount xo-win-amount">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<i class="fa fa-plus-circle"></i>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<span>+${t.winnings} points</span>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t`) : (i = "Defeat",
            e = `\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="xo-result-screen xo-lose">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="xo-result-icon">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<i class="fa fa-times-circle"></i>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<h2>You Lost</h2>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<p class="xo-result-message">${t.winner_name} won this round</p>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="xo-result-amount xo-lose-amount">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<i class="fa fa-minus-circle"></i>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<span>-${this.currentGame.bet_amount} points</span>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t`),
            e += '\n\t\t\t\t<div class="xo-result-actions">\n\t\t\t\t\t<button class="mic-btn mic-btn-primary" onclick="XOGame.close()">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<i class="fa fa-check"></i> Close\n\t\t\t\t\t</button>\n\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t',
            document.getElementById("xoGameBody").innerHTML = e,
            document.getElementById("xoGameTitle").textContent = i,
            t.winner_id != user_id && "draw" !== t.result || setTimeout(( () => this.createSparkles()), 100)
        }
        createSparkles() {
            const t = document.querySelector(".xo-sparkles");
            if (t)
                for (let e = 0; e < 20; e++) {
                    const e = document.createElement("div");
                    e.className = "sparkle",
                    e.style.left = 100 * Math.random() + "%",
                    e.style.top = 100 * Math.random() + "%",
                    e.style.animationDelay = 2 * Math.random() + "s",
                    e.innerHTML = "âœ¨",
                    t.appendChild(e)
                }
        }
        forfeit() {
            confirm("Are you sure you want to forfeit? You will lose your bet.") && window.msio.emit("xo_forfeit", {
                game_id: this.currentGame.game_id
            }, (t => {
                t && t.success || showNotify("Failed to forfeit", "error")
            }
            ))
        }
        close() {
            this.currentGame = null,
            this.mySymbol = null,
            this.isMyTurn = !1,
            document.getElementById("xoGameModal").style.display = "none",
            document.body.classList.remove("modal-open")
        }
    }

  showGeneralOptions() {
    const t = user_rank >= 100 || user_role >= 4
      , e = !!(this.isCurrentUserOnMic() || user_rank >= 100)
      , i = `
            <div class="mic-action-list">
                <div class="mic-action-item primary" onclick="MicModal.toggleGlobalMute()">
                    <i class="fa fa-volume-${m?.isGloballyMuted() ? "off" : "up"}"></i>
                    <span>${m?.isGloballyMuted() ? "Unmute Audio" : "Mute Audio"}</span>
                </div>
				${e ? `
					<div class="mic-action-item success" onclick="MicModal.startBattle()">
						<i class="fa fa-trophy"></i>
						<span>Start Mic Battle</span>
					</div>
				` : ""}
				${t ? `
					<div class="mic-action-item warning" onclick="MicModal.showBannedUsers()">
						<i class="fa fa-list"></i>
						<span>View Banned Users</span>
					</div>

				<div class="mic-action-item info" onclick="MicModal.showAudioSettings()">
					<i class="fa fa-sliders-h"></i>
					<span>Audio Settings</span>
				</div>
            </div>
        `;
    this.show("Microphone Options", i)
}
showAudioSettings() {
    // جلب الأجهزة المتاحة
    this.getAudioDevices().then(devices => {
        const savedDeviceId = localStorage.getItem('audio_device_id') || '';
        const savedChannelCount = localStorage.getItem('audio_channel_count') || '1';
        const savedSampleRate = localStorage.getItem('audio_sample_rate') || '48000';
        const savedEchoCancellation = localStorage.getItem('audio_echo_cancellation') || 'true';
        const savedNoiseSuppression = localStorage.getItem('audio_noise_suppression') || 'true';
        const savedAutoGainControl = localStorage.getItem('audio_auto_gain_control') || 'true';
        
        const deviceOptions = devices.map(device => 
            `<option value="${device.deviceId}" ${device.deviceId === savedDeviceId ? 'selected' : ''}>
                ${device.label || `Device ${device.deviceId.substring(0, 8)}`}
            </option>`
        ).join('');
        
        const html = `
            <div class="audio-settings-container">
                <h4 style="margin-bottom: 20px; color: #333;">🎤 Audio Device Settings</h4>
                
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label for="audioDeviceSelect" style="display: block; margin-bottom: 5px; font-weight: bold;">
                        <i class="fa fa-microphone"></i> Select Microphone:
                    </label>
                    <select id="audioDeviceSelect" class="form-control" style="width: 100%; padding: 8px; border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 4px;">
                        <option value="">Default System Device</option>
                        ${deviceOptions}
                    </select>
                </div>
                
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label for="audioChannelSelect" style="display: block; margin-bottom: 5px; font-weight: bold;">
                        <i class="fa fa-wave-square"></i> Audio Channels:
                    </label>
                    <select id="audioChannelSelect" class="form-control" style="width: 100%; padding: 8px; border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 4px;">
                        <option value="1" ${savedChannelCount === '1' ? 'selected' : ''}>Mono (1 channel)</option>
                        <option value="2" ${savedChannelCount === '2' ? 'selected' : ''}>Stereo (2 channels)</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
                
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label for="audioSampleRateSelect" style="display: block; margin-bottom: 5px; font-weight: bold;">
                        <i class="fa fa-tachometer-alt"></i> Sample Rate:
                    </label>
                    <select id="audioSampleRateSelect" class="form-control" style="width: 100%; padding: 8px; border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 4px;">
                        <option value="44100" ${savedSampleRate === '44100' ? 'selected' : ''}>44.1 kHz (CD Quality)</option>
                        <option value="48000" ${savedSampleRate === '48000' ? 'selected' : ''}>48 kHz (Standard)</option>
                        <option value="96000" ${savedSampleRate === '96000' ? 'selected' : ''}>96 kHz (High Quality)</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
                
                <div class="audio-advanced-settings" style="margin-top: 20px; padding: 15px; background: #f8f9fa; border-radius: 8px;">
                    <h5 style="margin-bottom: 15px; color: #555;">
                        <i class="fa fa-cog"></i> Advanced Settings
                    </h5>
                    
                    <div class="checkbox-group" style="margin-bottom: 10px;">
                        <label style="display: flex; align-items: center; cursor: pointer;">
                            <input type="checkbox" id="echoCancellation" ${savedEchoCancellation === 'true' ? 'checked' : ''} 
                                   style="margin-right: 10px;">
                            <span>Echo Cancellation</span>
                        </label>
                    </div>
                    
                    <div class="checkbox-group" style="margin-bottom: 10px;">
                        <label style="display: flex; align-items: center; cursor: pointer;">
                            <input type="checkbox" id="noiseSuppression" ${savedNoiseSuppression === 'true' ? 'checked' : ''}
                                   style="margin-right: 10px;">
                            <span>Noise Suppression</span>
                        </label>
                    </div>
                    
                    <div class="checkbox-group" style="margin-bottom: 10px;">
                        <label style="display: flex; align-items: center; cursor: pointer;">
                            <input type="checkbox" id="autoGainControl" ${savedAutoGainControl === 'true' ? 'checked' : ''}
                                   style="margin-right: 10px;">
                            <span>Auto Gain Control</span>
                        </label>
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <div class="button-group" style="margin-top: 25px; display: flex; gap: 10px;">
                    <button class="btn btn-secondary" onclick="MicModal.close()" 
                            style="flex: 1; padding: 10px; background: #6c757d; color: white; border: none; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer;">
                        <i class="fa fa-times"></i> Cancel
                    </button>
                    <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="MicModal.saveAudioSettings()"
                            style="flex: 1; padding: 10px; background: #007bff; color: white; border: none; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer;">
                        <i class="fa fa-save"></i> Save Settings
                    </button>
                    <button class="btn btn-success" onclick="MicModal.testAudioSettings()"
                            style="flex: 1; padding: 10px; background: #28a745; color: white; border: none; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer;">
                        <i class="fa fa-play-circle"></i> Test
                    </button>
                </div>
                
                <div id="audioTestResult" style="display:none; margin-top:20px; padding:15px; border-radius:8px;">
                    <!-- سيتم ملؤها ديناميكياً -->
                </div>
            </div>
        `;
        
        this.show("🎤 Audio Settings", html);
    }).catch(error => {
        const html = `
            <div class="audio-settings-container" style="text-align: center; padding: 20px;">
                <div class="alert alert-danger" style="background: #f8d7da; color: #721c24; padding: 15px; border-radius: 8px; margin-bottom: 20px;">
                    <i class="fa fa-exclamation-triangle" style="font-size: 24px; margin-bottom: 10px;"></i>
                    <div style="font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 5px;">Cannot access audio devices</div>
                    <div style="font-size: 14px; color: #666;">${error.message || 'Please check browser permissions'}</div>
                </div>
                <div class="button-group">
                    <button class="btn btn-secondary" onclick="MicModal.close()"
                            style="padding: 10px 20px; background: #6c757d; color: white; border: none; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer;">
                        <i class="fa fa-times"></i> Close
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>
        `;
        this.show("🎤 Audio Settings", html);
    });
}
        isCurrentUserOnMic() {
            if (void 0 !== g && g)
                return !0;
            const t = "undefined" != typeof user_id ? user_id : window.user_id;
            if (!t)
                return !1;
            for (let e = 1; e <= (window.mic_count || 10); e++) {
                const i = h ? h.getMicState(e) : null;
                if (i && i.user_id == t)
                    return !0
            }
            return !1
        }
        showSelfActions(t, e) {
            this.getCurrentUser();
            const i = this.getMyMicStatus()
              , n = `\n            <div class="mic-action-list">\n                ${i.onMic ? `\n                    <div class="mic-action-item ${i.isMuted ? "success" : "warning"}" onclick="MicModal.toggleMyMic()">\n                        <i class="fa fa-microphone${i.isMuted ? "" : "-slash"}"></i>\n                        <span>${i.isMuted ? "Unmute Mic" : "Mute Mic"}</span>\n                    </div>\n                    <div class="mic-action-item danger" onclick="MicModal.leaveMyMic()">\n                        <i class="fa fa-sign-out"></i>\n                        <span>Leave Microphone</span>\n                    </div>\n                ` : ""}\n            </div>\n            ${i.onMic ? this.generateEmojiSection() : '<div class="mic-loading">You are not on a microphone</div>'}\n        `;
            this.show("My Microphone", n)
        }
     showUserActions(t, e) {
    const i = this.getUserPermissions()
      , n = e
      , o = `
            <div class="mic-action-list">
                <div class="mic-action-item success" onclick="MicModal.openSendEmojiToUser(${t}, '${e}')">
                    <i class="fa fa-smile"></i>
                    <span>Send Emoji</span>
                </div>
                ${i.canKick ? `
                    <div class="mic-action-item danger" onclick="MicModal.kickUser(${t}, '${e}')">
                        <i class="fa fa-sign-out"></i>
                        <span>Remove from Mic</span>
                    </div>
                ` : ""}
                ${i.canBan ? `
                    <div class="mic-action-item danger" onclick="MicModal.banUser(${t}, '${e}')">
                        <i class="fa fa-ban"></i>
                        <span>Ban from Mics</span>
                    </div>
                ` : ""}
            </div>
        `;
    this.show(n, o)
}
openSendEmojiToUser(userId, username) {
    this.targetUserId = userId;
    this.targetUsername = username;
    const emojiSection = this.generateEmojiSectionForUser();
    this.show(`Send Emoji to ${username}`, emojiSection);
}

generateEmojiSectionForUser() {
    return `
            <div class="mic-emoji-section">
                <h4 class="mic-emoji-title">Choose an Emoji to Send</h4>
                <div class="mic-emoji-grid">
                    ${this.emojis.map((t => `
            <div class="mic-emoji-item" onclick="MicModal.sendEmojiToUser('${t}')" title="${t.replace(".gif", "").replace(/_/g, " ")}">
                <img src="default_images/emoji/${t}" alt="${t}">
            </div>
        `)).join("")}
                </div>
            </div>
        `
}

sendEmojiToUser(emoji) {
    if (!this.targetUserId) {
        showNotify('Error: No target user', 'error');
        return;
    }
    
    if (window.lastEmojiToUserTime && Date.now() - window.lastEmojiToUserTime < 3000) {
        showNotify("Please wait before sending another emoji", "warning");
        return;
    }
    
    if (window.msio && window.msio.connected) {
        const roomId = this.getCurrentRoomId();
        const senderId = "undefined" != typeof user_id ? user_id : window.user_id;
        const senderName = "undefined" != typeof my_username ? my_username : window.my_username;
        
        window.msio.emit('send_emoji_to_user', {
            sender_id: senderId,
            sender_name: senderName,
            target_user_id: this.targetUserId,
            target_username: this.targetUsername,
            emoji: emoji,
            room_id: roomId
        });
        
        window.lastEmojiToUserTime = Date.now();
        showNotify(`Emoji sent to ${this.targetUsername}!`, 'success');
        this.close();
    } else {
        showNotify("Connection not available", "error");
    }
}
        showGiftSelector() {
            if (!window.battleProgress || !window.battleProgress.isActive)
                return void showNotify("No active battle", "warning");
            this.show("ðŸŽ Send Gift", '<div class="gift-selector-loading"><i class="fa fa-spinner fa-spin"></i><p>Loading gifts...</p></div>'),
            window.msio && window.msio.connected && window.msio.emit("get_available_gifts", {}, (t => {
                t && t.gifts && t.gifts.length > 0 ? this.displayGifts(t.gifts) : document.getElementById("micModalBody").innerHTML = '<div class="gift-empty-state"><i class="fa fa-gift"></i><p>No gifts available</p></div>'
            }
            ))
        }
        displayGifts(t) {
            const e = `\n\t\t\t\t<div class="gift-selector">\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="gift-target-selector">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<label>Send to:</label>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<select id="giftTarget" class="gift-target-select">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<option value="">Select player...</option>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t${window.battleProgress.players.map((t => `<option value="${t.id}">${t.name}</option>`)).join("")}\n\t\t\t\t\t\t</select>\n\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="gift-grid">${t.map((t => `\n\t\t\t\t<div class="gift-item" data-gift-id="${t.id}" data-cost="${t.gift_cost}">\n\t\t\t\t\t<img src="gift/${t.gift_image}" class="gift-image">\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="gift-info">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="gift-title">${t.gift_title}</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="gift-cost"><i class="fa fa-diamond"></i> <span class="cost-value">${t.gift_cost}</span></div>\n\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="gift-quantity-selector">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<button class="qty-btn qty-minus" type="button">-</button>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<input type="number" class="qty-input" value="1" min="1" max="100" readonly>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<button class="qty-btn qty-plus" type="button">+</button>\n\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t<button class="gift-send-btn" type="button">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<i class="fa fa-paper-plane"></i> Send\n\t\t\t\t\t</button>\n\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t`)).join("")}</div>\n\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t`;
            document.getElementById("micModalBody").innerHTML = e,
            setTimeout(( () => {
                this.attachGiftEventListeners()
            }
            ), 100)
        }
        attachGiftEventListeners() {
            document.querySelectorAll(".qty-minus").forEach((t => {
                t.addEventListener("click", (e => {
                    e.preventDefault(),
                    e.stopPropagation(),
                    this.adjustQuantity(t, -1)
                }
                ))
            }
            )),
            document.querySelectorAll(".qty-plus").forEach((t => {
                t.addEventListener("click", (e => {
                    e.preventDefault(),
                    e.stopPropagation(),
                    this.adjustQuantity(t, 1)
                }
                ))
            }
            )),
            document.querySelectorAll(".gift-send-btn").forEach((t => {
                t.addEventListener("click", (e => {
                    e.preventDefault(),
                    e.stopPropagation(),
                    this.sendGiftWithQuantity(t)
                }
                ))
            }
            ))
        }
        adjustQuantity(t, e) {
            const i = t.closest(".gift-item")
              , n = i.querySelector(".qty-input")
              , o = parseInt(n.value) || 1
              , s = Math.max(1, Math.min(100, o + e));
            n.value = s;
            const a = parseInt(i.dataset.cost) * s;
            i.querySelector(".cost-value").textContent = a.toLocaleString()
        }
        sendGiftWithQuantity(t) {
            const e = t.closest(".gift-item")
              , i = e.dataset.giftId
              , n = parseInt(e.querySelector(".qty-input").value) || 1
              , o = document.getElementById("giftTarget").value;
            o ? this.sendGift(i, o, n) : showNotify("Select a player first", "warning")
        }
        sendGift(t, e, i=1) {
            window.msio && window.msio.connected ? (console.log("[GIFT] Sending:", {
                giftId: t,
                targetId: e,
                quantity: i,
                roomId: M,
                battleId: window.battleProgress?.battleId
            }),
            window.msio.emit("send_battle_gift", {
                gift_id: t,
                my_name: "undefined" != typeof my_username ? my_username : "",
                target_player_id: e,
                room_id: M,
                battle_id: window.battleProgress?.battleId,
                quantity: i
            }, (e => {
                if (console.log("[GIFT] Response:", e),
                e && e.success) {
                    showNotify("Gift sent successfully!", "success");
                    const e = document.querySelector(`[data-gift-id="${t}"]`);
                    if (e) {
                        e.querySelector(".qty-input").value = 1;
                        const t = parseInt(e.dataset.cost);
                        e.querySelector(".cost-value").textContent = t.toLocaleString()
                    }
                } else if (e && "Insufficient ruby" === e.error)
                    showNotify(`Need ${e.required} ruby, you have ${e.current}`, "error");
                else if (e && "Players on microphones cannot send gifts" === e.error)
                    showNotify("Only listeners can send gifts during battles", "warning");
                else if (e && e.error) {
                    const t = e.details ? `${e.error}: ${e.details}` : e.error;
                    showNotify(t, "error"),
                    console.error("[GIFT] Error details:", e)
                } else
                    showNotify("Failed to send gift", "error")
            }
            ))) : showNotify("Connection not available", "error")
        }
        showConvertRuby() {
            window.msio.emit("get_user_balances", {}, (t => {
                if (t.error)
                    return void showNotify(t.error, "error");
                const e = t.points || 0
                  , i = t.ruby || 0
                  , n = `\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="convert-ruby-container">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="balance-display">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="balance-item">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<i class="fa
