fa-coins"></i>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<span class="balance-label">Current Points:</span>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<span class="balance-value" id="current-points">${e.toLocaleString()}</span>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="balance-item">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<i class="fa fa-gem"></i>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<span class="balance-label">Current Ruby:</span>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<span class="balance-value ruby" id="current-ruby">${i.toLocaleString()}</span>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="conversion-info">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<i class="fa fa-info-circle"></i>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<span>Conversion Rate: <strong>1 Ruby = 10 Points</strong></span>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="form-group">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<label for="ruby-amount">Ruby Amount:</label>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<input \n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttype="number" \n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tid="ruby-amount" \n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tclass="form-control" \n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tplaceholder="Enter ruby amount"\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tmin="1"\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tmax="${Math.floor(e / 10)}"\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<small class="form-text">Maximum: ${Math.floor(e / 10)} ruby</small>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="conversion-preview" id="conversion-preview" style="display: none;">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="preview-row">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<span>Points Required:</span>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<span class="preview-value" id="points-required">0</span>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="preview-row">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<span>Ruby You'll Get:</span>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<span class="preview-value ruby" id="ruby-get">0</span>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="preview-divider"></div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="preview-row result">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<span>After Conversion:</span>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<span class="preview-value">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<span id="new-points">0</span> Points | \n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<span id="new-ruby" class="ruby">0</span> Ruby\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t</span>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="button-group">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<button class="btn btn-secondary" onclick="MicModal.close()">Cancel</button>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="MicModal.confirmConversion()" id="convert-btn" disabled>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<i class="fa fa-exchange-alt"></i> Convert\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t</button>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t`;
                this.show("Convert Points to Ruby", n);
                const o = document.getElementById("ruby-amount")
                  , s = document.getElementById("convert-btn")
                  , a = document.getElementById("conversion-preview");
                o.addEventListener("input", (t => {
                    const n = parseInt(t.target.value) || 0;
                    if (n > 0 && n <= Math.floor(e / 10)) {
                        const t = 10 * n
                          , o = e - t
                          , r = i + n;
                        document.getElementById("points-required").textContent = t.toLocaleString(),
                        document.getElementById("ruby-get").textContent = n.toLocaleString(),
                        document.getElementById("new-points").textContent = o.toLocaleString(),
                        document.getElementById("new-ruby").textContent = r.toLocaleString(),
                        a.style.display = "block",
                        s.disabled = !1
                    } else
                        a.style.display = "none",
                        s.disabled = !0
                }
                ))
            }
            ))
        }
        confirmConversion() {
            const t = parseInt(document.getElementById("ruby-amount").value) || 0;
            if (t <= 0)
                return void showNotify("Please enter a valid amount", "error");
            if (!confirm(`Convert ${(10 * t).toLocaleString()} points to ${t.toLocaleString()} ruby?`))
                return;
            const e = document.getElementById("convert-btn");
            e.disabled = !0,
            e.innerHTML = '<i class="fa fa-spinner fa-spin"></i> Converting...',
            window.msio.emit("convert_points_to_ruby", {
                ruby_amount: t
            }, (t => {
                if (t.error)
                    return showNotify(t.error, "error"),
                    e.disabled = !1,
                    void (e.innerHTML = '<i class="fa fa-exchange-alt"></i> Convert');
                showNotify(`Successfully converted ${t.points_deducted.toLocaleString()} points to ${t.ruby_added.toLocaleString()} ruby!`, "success");
                const i = document.querySelector(".user-points")
                  , n = document.querySelector(".user-ruby");
                i && (i.textContent = t.new_points.toLocaleString()),
                n && (n.textContent = t.new_ruby.toLocaleString()),
                this.close()
            }
            ))
        }
        showBattleInvite(t) {
            const e = `\n\t\t\t\t<div class="battle-invite-modal">\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="battle-invite-header">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<i class="fa fa-trophy" style="font-size: 48px; color: #f39c12;"></i>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<h3>${t.initiator} wants to start a mic battle!</h3>\n\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="battle-invite-details">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<p><strong>Duration:</strong> ${Math.floor(t.duration / 60)} minutes</p>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<p><strong>Players:</strong> ${t.invitees.length + 1}</p>\n\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="battle-invite-actions">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<button class="battle-invite-btn accept" onclick="MicModal.respondToBattleInvite('${t.battle_id}', true)">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<i class="fa fa-check"></i> Accept\n\t\t\t\t\t\t</button>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<button class="battle-invite-btn decline" onclick="MicModal.respondToBattleInvite('${t.battle_id}', false)">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<i class="fa fa-times"></i> Decline\n\t\t\t\t\t\t</button>\n\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t`;
            this.show("âš”ï¸ Battle Invitation", e, {
                persistent: !0
            }),
            this.currentBattleInvite = t.battle_id
        }
        respondToBattleInvite(t, e) {
            window.msio && window.msio.connected ? (this.close(),
            showNotify(e ? "Accepting invitation..." : "Declining invitation...", "info"),
            window.msio.emit("battle_invite_response", {
                battle_id: t,
                accepted: e
            }, (t => {
                t && t.success ? t.cancelled || t.waiting && showNotify("Waiting for other players to accept...", "info") : showNotify(t?.error || "Failed to respond", "error")
            }
            ))) : showNotify("Connection not available", "error")
        }
        show(t, e) {
            document.getElementById("micModalTitle").textContent = t,
            document.getElementById("micModalBody").innerHTML = e;
            const i = window.innerWidth - document.documentElement.clientWidth;
            i > 0 && (document.body.style.paddingRight = i + "px"),
            document.body.classList.add("modal-open"),
            document.getElementById("micActionModal").style.display = "flex"
        }
        close() {
            document.getElementById("micActionModal").style.display = "none",
            document.body.style.paddingRight = "",
            document.body.classList.remove("modal-open"),
            window.battleProgress && window.battleProgress.hasEnded && window.battleProgress.forceHide()
        }
        showInvite(t) {
            this.currentInvite = t,
            document.getElementById("inviteUserName").textContent = t.from_user_name;
            let e = Math.floor((t.expires_at - Date.now()) / 1e3);
            this.updateInviteTimer(e),
            this.inviteTimer = setInterval(( () => {
                e--,
                this.updateInviteTimer(e),
                e <= 0 && (this.closeInvite(),
                showNotify("Microphone invite expired", "warning"))
            }
            ), 1e3);
            const i = window.innerWidth - document.documentElement.clientWidth;
            i > 0 && (document.body.style.paddingRight = i + "px"),
            document.body.classList.add("modal-open"),
            document.getElementById("micInviteModal").style.display = "flex"
        }
        updateInviteTimer(t) {
            document.getElementById("inviteTimer").textContent = t;
            const e = document.getElementById("inviteTimer");
            e.style.color = t <= 10 ? "#ff6b6b" : t <= 20 ? "#3f9500" : "#55f370"
        }
        closeInvite() {
            this.inviteTimer && (clearInterval(this.inviteTimer),
            this.inviteTimer = null),
            this.currentInvite = null,
            document.getElementById("micInviteModal").style.display = "none",
            document.body.style.paddingRight = "",
            document.body.classList.remove("modal-open")
        }
        acceptInvite() {
            this.currentInvite && ("function" == typeof window.acceptMicInvite && window.acceptMicInvite(this.currentInvite.invite_id, this.currentInvite.room_id),
            this.closeInvite())
        }
        declineInvite() {
            this.currentInvite && ("function" == typeof window.declineMicInvite && window.declineMicInvite(this.currentInvite.invite_id, this.currentInvite.room_id),
            this.closeInvite())
        }
        toggleGlobalMute() {
            "function" == typeof window.toggleAudioMute && window.toggleAudioMute(),
            this.close()
        }
        startBattle() {
            if ("function" == typeof window.startMicBattle) {
                window.startMicBattle()
            }
            this.close()
        }
        addRandomPoints() {
            if ("function" == typeof window.randomMicPoints) {
                window.randomMicPoints() && showNotify("Random points added!", "success")
            }
            this.close()
        }
        endBattle() {
            if ("function" == typeof window.endMicBattle) {
                window.endMicBattle() && showNotify("Battle ended!", "info")
            }
            this.close()
        }
        toggleMyMic() {
            const t = this.getMyMicStatus();
            t.onMic && (t.isMuted ? "function" == typeof window.unmuteMyMic && (window.unmuteMyMic(),
            showNotify("Microphone unmuted", "success")) : "function" == typeof window.muteMyMic && (window.muteMyMic(),
            showNotify("Microphone muted", "warning"))),
            this.close()
        }
        leaveMyMic() {
            "function" == typeof window.leaveMyMic && window.leaveMyMic(),
            this.close()
        }
		async getAudioDevices() {
    if (!navigator.mediaDevices || !navigator.mediaDevices.enumerateDevices) {
        throw new Error('MediaDevices API not supported in your browser');
    }
    
    try {
        // طلب الإذن أولاً للحصول على أسماء الأجهزة
        await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({ audio: true });
        
        const devices = await navigator.mediaDevices.enumerateDevices();
        const audioInputs = devices.filter(device => device.kind === 'audioinput');
        
        console.log('[AudioSettings] Found audio devices:', audioInputs);
        return audioInputs;
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('[AudioSettings] Error getting devices:', error);
        throw error;
    }
}

saveAudioSettings() {
    try {
        const deviceSelect = document.getElementById('audioDeviceSelect');
        const channelSelect = document.getElementById('audioChannelSelect');
        const sampleRateSelect = document.getElementById('audioSampleRateSelect');
        const echoCancellation = document.getElementById('echoCancellation');
        const noiseSuppression = document.getElementById('noiseSuppression');
        const autoGainControl = document.getElementById('autoGainControl');
        
        const settings = {
            deviceId: deviceSelect?.value || '',
            channelCount: channelSelect?.value || '1',
            sampleRate: sampleRateSelect?.value || '48000',
            echoCancellation: echoCancellation?.checked || false,
            noiseSuppression: noiseSuppression?.checked || false,
            autoGainControl: autoGainControl?.checked || false
        };
        
        // حفظ في localStorage
        localStorage.setItem('audio_device_id', settings.deviceId);
        localStorage.setItem('audio_channel_count', settings.channelCount);
        localStorage.setItem('audio_sample_rate', settings.sampleRate);
        localStorage.setItem('audio_echo_cancellation', settings.echoCancellation.toString());
        localStorage.setItem('audio_noise_suppression', settings.noiseSuppression.toString());
        localStorage.setItem('audio_auto_gain_control', settings.autoGainControl.toString());
        
        console.log('[AudioSettings] Saved settings:', settings);
        showNotify('🎤 Audio settings saved successfully!', 'success');
        
        // إذا كان المستخدم على الميكروفون حالياً، نعرض خيار إعادة الاتصال
        const myMicStatus = this.getMyMicStatus();
        if (myMicStatus.onMic) {
            setTimeout(() => {
                if (confirm('Your audio settings have been saved. Do you want to rejoin the microphone with new settings?')) {
                    const micId = myMicStatus.micId;
                    window.msLeaveMyMic(micId);
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        if (window.j && typeof window.j === 'function') {
                            window.j(micId);
                        }
                    }, 1500);
                }
            }, 500);
        }
        
        this.close();
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('[AudioSettings] Error saving settings:', error);
        showNotify('Failed to save audio settings', 'error');
    }
}

async testAudioSettings() {
    const resultDiv = document.getElementById('audioTestResult');
    if (!resultDiv) return;
    
    resultDiv.style.display = 'block';
    resultDiv.innerHTML = `
        <div style="background: #e7f3ff; padding: 15px; border-radius: 8px; border-left: 4px solid #2196F3;">
            <div style="display: flex; align-items: center;">
                <i class="fa fa-spinner fa-spin" style="margin-right: 10px; color: #2196F3;"></i>
                <span style="font-weight: bold;">Testing microphone...</span>
            </div>
            <div style="margin-top: 10px; font-size: 13px; color: #666;">
                Speak into your microphone to test the audio quality
            </div>
        </div>
    `;
    
    try {
        const deviceSelect = document.getElementById('audioDeviceSelect');
        const channelSelect = document.getElementById('audioChannelSelect');
        const sampleRateSelect = document.getElementById('audioSampleRateSelect');
        const echoCancellation = document.getElementById('echoCancellation');
        const noiseSuppression = document.getElementById('noiseSuppression');
        const autoGainControl = document.getElementById('autoGainControl');
        
        const constraints = {
            audio: {
                deviceId: deviceSelect?.value ? { exact: deviceSelect.value } : undefined,
                channelCount: parseInt(channelSelect?.value || '1'),
                sampleRate: parseInt(sampleRateSelect?.value || '48000'),
                echoCancellation: echoCancellation?.checked || true,
                noiseSuppression: noiseSuppression?.checked || true,
                autoGainControl: autoGainControl?.checked || true
            }
        };
        
        console.log('[AudioTest] Testing with constraints:', constraints);
        
        const stream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia(constraints);
        const audioTrack = stream.getAudioTracks()[0];
        const settings = audioTrack.getSettings();
        
        // إنشاء معاينة صوتية
        const audioContext = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
        const source = audioContext.createMediaStreamSource(stream);
        const analyser = audioContext.createAnalyser();
        analyser.fftSize = 256;
        source.connect(analyser);
        
        // تحليل مستوى الصوت
        const dataArray = new Uint8Array(analyser.frequencyBinCount);
        
        let testDuration = 0;
        const testInterval = setInterval(() => {
            analyser.getByteFrequencyData(dataArray);
            const average = dataArray.reduce((a, b) => a + b) / dataArray.length;
            
            testDuration += 100;
            
            // تحديث واجهة الاختبار
            resultDiv.innerHTML = `
                <div style="background: #d4edda; padding: 15px; border-radius: 8px; border-left: 4px solid #28a745;">
                    <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 10px;">
                        <i class="fa fa-check-circle" style="margin-right: 10px; color: #28a745; font-size: 20px;"></i>
                        <span style="font-weight: bold; color: #155724;">Microphone Test Successful!</span>
                    </div>
                    <div style="background: white; padding: 10px; border-radius: 6px; margin: 10px 0;">
                        <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 5px;">
                            <span>Audio Level:</span>
                            <span style="font-weight: bold; color: ${average > 20 ? '#28a745' : '#dc3545'}">
                                ${average.toFixed(1)}
                            </span>
                        </div>
                        <div style="height: 10px; background: #eee; border-radius: 5px; overflow: hidden;">
                            <div style="height: 100%; width: ${Math.min(average, 100)}%; background: ${average > 20 ? '#28a745' : '#ffc107'};"></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div style="font-size: 13px; color: #666;">
                        <div><strong>Device:</strong> ${settings.deviceId ? 'Selected Device' : 'Default System Device'}</div>
                        <div><strong>Channels:</strong> ${settings.channelCount || '1'}</div>
                        <div><strong>Sample Rate:</strong> ${settings.sampleRate ? (settings.sampleRate/1000) + ' kHz' : 'N/A'}</div>
                        <div><strong>Echo Cancellation:</strong> ${settings.echoCancellation ? 'Enabled' : 'Disabled'}</div>
                        <div style="margin-top: 10px; font-style: italic;">
                            Speak into your microphone to see the audio level meter
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            `;
            
            if (testDuration >= 5000) {
                clearInterval(testInterval);
                audioTrack.stop();
                audioContext.close();
                
                setTimeout(() => {
                    resultDiv.style.display = 'none';
                }, 2000);
            }
        }, 100);
        
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('[AudioTest] Error:', error);
        resultDiv.innerHTML = `
            <div style="background: #f8d7da; padding: 15px; border-radius: 8px; border-left: 4px solid #dc3545;">
                <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 10px;">
                    <i class="fa fa-times-circle" style="margin-right: 10px; color: #dc3545; font-size: 20px;"></i>
                    <span style="font-weight: bold; color: #721c24;">Test Failed</span>
                </div>
                <div style="font-size: 14px; color: #666;">
                    ${error.message || 'Unable to access microphone with these settings'}
                </div>
                <div style="margin-top: 10px; font-size: 13px; color: #999;">
                    Try selecting a different device or adjusting the settings
                </div>
            </div>
        `;
        
        setTimeout(() => {
            resultDiv.style.display = 'none';
        }, 5000);
    }
}

// أخيراً: تحتاج لتعديل دالة j (التي تسمى في الكود الأصلي) لتطبيق الإعدادات
// ابحث عن دالة j في الكود وأضف هذا الكود فيها:


        async kickUser(t, e, i=0) {
            if (0 != i || confirm(`Are you sure you want to remove ${e} from the microphone?`)) {
                try {
                    let i = null;
                    const n = Number(window.mic_count) || 10;
                    for (let e = 1; e <= n; e++) {
                        let n = null;
                        if (window.persistentState && "function" == typeof window.persistentState.getMicState ? n = window.persistentState.getMicState(e) : window.micStatus && (n = window.micStatus[e]),
                        n && n.user_id == t) {
                            i = e;
                            break
                        }
                    }
                    if (!i)
                        return showNotify("User not found on any microphone", "warning"),
                        void this.close();
                    const o = this.getCurrentRoomId();
                    if (!o)
                        return showNotify("Unable to determine current room", "error"),
                        void this.close();
                    "function" == typeof window.adminWipeSlot ? (window.adminWipeSlot(t, o, i),
                    showNotify(`${e} removed from microphone`, "success")) : showNotify("Admin action not available", "error")
                } catch (t) {
                    console.error("Error kicking user:", t),
                    showNotify("Failed to remove user from microphone", "error")
                }
                this.close()
            }
        }
        banUser(t, e) {
            if (!confirm(`Are you sure you want to ban ${e} from using microphones?`))
                return;
            const i = this.getCurrentRoomId();
            if (!i || !window.msio || !window.msio.connected)
                return showNotify("Connection not available", "error"),
                void this.close();
            window.msio.emit("ban_user_from_mic", {
                room_id: k(i),
                target_user_id: t,
                target_username: e,
                staff_id: "undefined" != typeof user_id ? user_id : window.user_id,
                staff_name: "undefined" != typeof my_username ? my_username : window.my_username
            }),
            this.kickUser(t, e, 1),
            showNotify(`Banning ${e} from microphones...`, "info"),
            this.close()
        }
        showBannedUsers() {
            const t = this.getCurrentRoomId();
            if (!t || !window.msio || !window.msio.connected)
                return void showNotify("Connection not available", "error");
            this.show("Banned Users", '\n\t\t\t<div class="mic-loading">\n\t\t\t\t<i class="fa fa-spinner fa-spin"></i>\n\t\t\t\t<p>Loading banned users...</p>\n\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t'),
            window.msio.emit("get_banned_users", {
                room_id: k(t)
            })
        }
        displayBannedUsers(t) {
            const e = "Banned Users";
            if (!t || 0 === t.length) {
                const t = '\n\t\t\t\t<div class="mic-empty-state">\n\t\t\t\t\t<i class="fa fa-ban"></i>\n\t\t\t\t\t<p>No users are currently banned from microphones</p>\n\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t';
                return void this.show(e, t)
            }
            const i = `\n\t\t\t<div class="mic-ban-list">\n\t\t\t\t${t.map((t => `\n\t\t\t<div class="mic-ban-item">\n\t\t\t\t<div class="mic-ban-user-info">\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="mic-ban-user-name">${t.username}</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="mic-ban-user-id">ID: ${t.user_id}</div>\n\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t<div class="mic-ban-actions">\n\t\t\t\t\t<button class="mic-btn mic-btn-success" onclick="MicModal.unbanUser(${t.user_id}, '${t.username}')">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<i class="fa fa-check"></i> Unban\n\t\t\t\t\t</button>\n\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t`)).join("")}\n\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t`;
            this.show(e, i)
        }
        unbanUser(t, e) {
            if (!confirm(`Unban ${e} and allow them to use microphones again?`))
                return;
            const i = this.getCurrentRoomId();
            i && window.msio && window.msio.connected ? (window.msio.emit("unban_user_from_mic", {
                room_id: k(i),
                target_user_id: t,
                target_username: e,
                staff_id: "undefined" != typeof user_id ? user_id : window.user_id,
                staff_name: "undefined" != typeof my_username ? my_username : window.my_username
            }),
            showNotify(`Unbanning ${e}...`, "info")) : showNotify("Connection not available", "error")
        }
        inviteUser(t, e) {
            if (!confirm(`Invite ${e} to join a microphone?`))
                return;
            const i = this.getCurrentRoomId();
            if (!i || !window.msio || !window.msio.connected)
                return showNotify("Connection not available", "error"),
                void this.close();
            const n = Date.now() + "-" + Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9);
            window.msio.emit("send_mic_invite", {
                room_id: function(t) {
                    return "function" == typeof window.getChannelId ? window.getChannelId(t) : t.toString().startsWith("room_") ? t : "room_" + t
                }(i),
                target_user_id: t,
                target_username: e,
                from_user_id: "undefined" != typeof user_id ? user_id : window.user_id,
                from_username: "undefined" != typeof my_username ? my_username : window.my_username,
                invite_id: n
            }),
            showNotify(`Microphone invite sent to ${e}`, "success"),
            this.close()
        }
        sendEmoji(t) {
            const e = this.getMyMicStatus();
            if (e.onMic)
                if (window.lastEmojiTime && Date.now() - window.lastEmojiTime < 3e3)
                    showNotify("Please wait before sending another emoji", "warning");
                else if (window.msio && window.msio.connected) {
                    const i = this.getCurrentRoomId();
                    window.msio.emit("set_emoji", {
                        userid: "undefined" != typeof user_id ? user_id : window.user_id,
                        emoji: t,
                        room_id: i,
                        mic_id: e.micId
                    }),
                    window.lastEmojiTime = Date.now(),
                    showNotify("Emoji sent!", "success"),
                    this.close()
                } else
                    showNotify("Connection not available", "error");
            else
                showNotify("You must be on a microphone to send emojis", "warning")
        }
        generateEmojiSection() {
            return `\n            <div class="mic-emoji-section">\n                <h4 class="mic-emoji-title">Send Emoji</h4>\n                <div class="mic-emoji-grid">\n                    ${this.emojis.map((t => `\n            <div class="mic-emoji-item" onclick="MicModal.sendEmoji('${t}')" title="${t.replace(".png", "")}">\n                <img src="default_images/emoji/${t}" alt="${t}">\n            </div>\n        `)).join("")}\n                </div>\n            </div>\n        `
        }
        getCurrentUser() {
            return {
                name: "undefined" != typeof my_username ? my_username : window.my_username || "User",
                avatar: $(".glob_av").attr("src") || "default_images/default_avatar.png"
            }
        }
        getMyMicStatus() {
            return "function" == typeof window.getMyMicStatus ? window.getMyMicStatus() : {
                onMic: !1,
                micId: null,
                isMuted: !1,
                roomId: null
            }
        }
        getUserPermissions() {
            const t = "undefined" != typeof user_role ? user_role : window.user_role || 0
              , e = ("undefined" != typeof user_rank ? user_rank : window.user_rank || 0) >= 100;
            return {
                canKick: e || t >= 4,
                canBan: e || t >= 6,
                canInvite: !0
            }
        }
        getCurrentRoomId() {
            return void 0 !== window.room_id ? window.room_id : "undefined" != typeof room_id ? room_id : "undefined" != typeof user_room ? user_room : null
        }
    }
    ;
    class u {
        constructor(t="battleProgressBar") {
            this.containerId = t,
            this.container = null,
            this.players = [],
            this.timeRemaining = 300,
            this.timer = null,
            this.isActive = !1,
            this.battleId = null,
            this.colors = ["linear-gradient(90deg, #4facfe 0%, #00f2fe 100%)", "linear-gradient(90deg, #fa709a 0%, #fee140 100%)", "linear-gradient(90deg, #a8edea 0%, #fed6e3 100%)", "linear-gradient(90deg, #ffecd2 0%, #fcb69f 100%)", "linear-gradient(90deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%)", "linear-gradient(90deg, #f093fb 0%, #f5576c 100%)", "linear-gradient(90deg, #4ecdc4 0%, #44a08d 100%)", "linear-gradient(90deg, #ffeaa7 0%, #fab1a0 100%)"]
        }
        ensureContainer() {
            return this.container || (this.container = document.getElementById(this.containerId)),
            !!this.container
        }
        getCurrentMicPlayers() {
            const t = [];
            for (let e = 1; e <= (window.mic_count || 10); e++) {
                const i = h ? h.getMicState(e) : null;
                i && i.user_id && t.push({
                    id: i.user_id,
                    name: i.user_name || `Player ${e}`,
                    avatar: i.avatar || "",
                    micId: e,
                    user_sid: i.user_sid
                })
            }
            return t
        }
        start(t=null, e=300) {
            if (!this.ensureContainer())
                return showNotify("Battle system not ready", "error"),
                !1;
            if (C("[Battle] Start called with duration:", e),
            this.isActive && !this.hasEnded)
                return C("[Battle] Battle already active, ignoring start request"),
                !1;
            if (e < 10)
                return C("[Battle] Duration too short:", e, "seconds"),
                !1;
            if ((!t || 0 === t.length) && (t = this.getCurrentMicPlayers()).length < 2)
                return showNotify("Need at least 2 players on microphones", "warning"),
                !1;
            this.isActive = !1,
            this.hasEnded = !1,
            this._modalShown = !1,
            this.timer && (clearInterval(this.timer),
            this.timer = null),
            this._fallbackTimeout && (clearTimeout(this._fallbackTimeout),
            this._fallbackTimeout = null),
            this.players = t.map(( (t, e) => ({
                id: t.id,
                name: t.name,
                avatar: t.avatar,
                score: 0,
                micId: t.micId,
                color: this.colors[e % this.colors.length]
            }))),
            this.timeRemaining = e,
            this.isActive = !0,
            this.battleId = Date.now() + "-" + Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9),
            window.msio && window.msio.connected && window.msio.emit("battle_state_change", {
                room_id: M,
                is_active: !0,
                battle_id: this.battleId
            }),
            this.container.style.display = "block",
            this.renderPlayers(),
            this.startTimer(),
            this.updateDisplay();
            const i = document.getElementById("battle-gift-toggle");
            return i && (i.style.display = "block"),
            showNotify(`Battle started with ${this.players.length} players!`, "success"),
            C("[Battle] Started successfully - timer should be running"),
            !0
        }
        renderPlayers() {
            const t = document.getElementById("playersContainer");
            t && (t.innerHTML = this.players.map((t => `\n\t\t\t<div class="player-item" id="player-${t.id}">\n\t\t\t\t<div class="crown">ðŸ‘‘</div>\n\t\t\t\t<img src="${t.avatar}" alt="${t.name}" class="player-avatar">\n\t\t\t\t<div class="player-name">${t.name}</div>\n\t\t\t\t<div class="player-score">0</div>\n\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t`)).join(""))
        }
        addPoints(t, e) {
            if (!this.isActive)
                return !1;
            const i = this.players.find((e => e.id == t));
            if (!i)
                return !1;
            if (i.micId) {
                const e = h ? h.getMicState(i.micId) : null;
                if (!e || e.user_id != t)
                    return C("[Battle] Player left mic, removing from battle"),
                    !1
            }
            return i.score += e,
            this.updateDisplay(),
            this.showGiftBurst(t),
            !0
        }
        updateDisplay() {
            this.players.forEach((t => {
                const e = document.getElementById(`player-${t.id}`);
                if (e) {
                    const i = e.querySelector(".player-score");
                    i && (i.textContent = t.score)
                }
            }
            )),
            this.updateProgressBar(),
            this.updateLeadingPlayer()
        }
        updateProgressBar() {
            const t = document.getElementById("progressBar");
            if (!t)
                return;
            const e = this.players.reduce(( (t, e) => t + e.score), 0);
            if (t.innerHTML = "",
            0 === e) {
                const e = 100 / this.players.length;
                this.players.forEach((i => {
                    const n = document.createElement("div");
                    n.className = "progress-segment",
                    n.style.background = i.color,
                    n.style.width = e + "%",
                    t.appendChild(n)
                }
                ))
            } else
                this.players.forEach((i => {
                    const n = i.score / e * 100;
                    if (n > 0) {
                        const e = document.createElement("div");
                        e.className = "progress-segment",
                        e.style.background = i.color,
                        e.style.width = n + "%",
                        t.appendChild(e)
                    }
                }
                ))
        }
        removePlayer(t) {
            if (this.hasEnded)
                return void C("[Battle] Already ended, ignoring removePlayer call");
            const e = this.players.findIndex((e => e.id === t));
            if (-1 === e)
                return;
            const i = this.players[e];
            return C(`[Battle] Removing player ${i.name}`),
            this.players.splice(e, 1),
            0 === this.players.length ? (showNotify("Battle ended - all players left", "warning"),
            void this.end("all_left")) : 1 === this.players.length ? (showNotify(`${this.players[0].name} wins - last player standing!`, "success"),
            void this.end("last_standing")) : (this.renderPlayers(),
            this.updateDisplay(),
            void showNotify(`${i.name} left the battle`, "info"))
        }
        updateLeadingPlayer() {
            const t = Math.max(...this.players.map((t => t.score)));
            this.players.forEach((e => {
                const i = document.getElementById(`player-${e.id}`);
                i && i.classList.toggle("leading", e.score === t && t > 0)
            }
            ))
        }
        startTimer() {
            this.timer && (clearInterval(this.timer),
            this.timer = null),
            this.updateTimer(),
            C("[Battle] Starting timer with", this.timeRemaining, "seconds"),
            this.timer = setInterval(( () => {
                if (this.hasEnded || !this.isActive)
                    return C("[Battle] Timer detected battle ended, clearing interval"),
                    clearInterval(this.timer),
                    void (this.timer = null);
                if (this.timeRemaining--,
                this.updateTimer(),
                this.timeRemaining <= 0)
                    return C("[Battle] Timer reached 0, ending battle"),
                    clearInterval(this.timer),
                    this.timer = null,
                    void this.end("timer");
                const t = this.checkActivePlayers();
                0 === t.length ? (clearInterval(this.timer),
                this.timer = null,
                showNotify("Battle ended - all players left", "warning"),
                this.end("all_left")) : 1 === t.length && (clearInterval(this.timer),
                this.timer = null,
                showNotify(`${t[0].name} wins - last player standing!`, "success"),
                this.end("last_standing"))
            }
            ), 1e3),
            C("[Battle] Timer interval set")
        }
        checkActivePlayers() {
            const t = [];
            return this.players.forEach((e => {
                if (e.micId) {
                    const i = h ? h.getMicState(e.micId) : null;
                    i && i.user_id == e.id && t.push(e)
                }
            }
            )),
            t
        }
        updateTimer() {
            const t = document.getElementById("battleTimer");
            if (t) {
                const e = Math.floor(this.timeRemaining / 60)
                  , i = this.timeRemaining % 60;
                t.textContent = `${e}:${i.toString().padStart(2, "0")}`,
                t.classList.toggle("warning", this.timeRemaining <= 30)
            }
        }
        showGiftBurst(t) {
            const e = document.getElementById(`player-${t}`);
            if (!e)
                return;
            const i = document.createElement("div");
            i.className = "gift-burst",
            i.textContent = "ðŸŽ",
            e.style.position = "relative",
            e.appendChild(i),
            setTimeout(( () => i.remove()), 800)
        }
        showDrawModal(t=null) {
            let e;
            const i = this.finalPlayers || this.players;
            if (t && 0 !== t.length) {
                e = `\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="battle-results">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="battle-draw-notice">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<h3 style="margin: 15px 0;">It's a Draw!</h3>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t${t.map((t => `\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="battle-winner-item" style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #95a5a6 0%, #bdc3c7 100%);">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<img src="${t.avatar}" class="battle-winner-avatar">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="battle-winner-info">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="battle-winner-name">ðŸ¤ ${t.name}</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="battle-winner-points">${t.score} points</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t`)).join("")}\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="battle-all-players">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<h4>Final Scores:</h4>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t ${i.map((t => `\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="battle-player-result">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<span>${t.name}</span>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<span class="battle-player-score">${t.score} pts</span>\n\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t`)).join("")}\n\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t`
            } else {
                e = `\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="battle-results">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="battle-draw-notice">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<i class="fa fa-handshake-o" style="font-size: 48px; color: #222;"></i>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<h3 style="margin: 15px 0;">It's a Draw!</h3>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<p style="color: #7f8c8d;">No points were scored</p>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="battle-all-players">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<h4>Players:</h4>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t${i.map((t => `\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="battle-player-result">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<img src="${t.avatar}" class="battle-draw-avatar">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<span>${t.name}</span>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<span class="battle-player-score">0 pts</span>\n\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t`)).join("")}\n\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t`
            }
            window.MicModal && window.MicModal.show("Battle Draw", e)
        }
        end(t="timer") {
            if (this.hasEnded)
                return C("[Battle] Already ended, ignoring duplicate end call"),
                this.finalWinners || [];
            C("[Battle] Ending battle, reason:", t),
            this.hasEnded = !0,
            this.isActive = !1,
            this._stopMonitoring = !0,
            this.timer && (clearInterval(this.timer),
            this.timer = null,
            C("[Battle] Timer cleared"));
            const e = this.players.map((t => ({
                id: t.id,
                name: t.name,
                avatar: t.avatar,
                score: t.score,
                micId: t.micId,
                color: t.color
            })));
            e.sort(( (t, e) => e.score - t.score));
            const i = document.getElementById("battle-gift-toggle");
            if (i && (i.style.display = "none"),
            this.finalPlayers = e,
            this.endReason = t,
            setTimeout(( () => {
                this.hasEnded && (this.hide(),
                C("[Battle] UI hidden after timeout"))
            }
            ), 2e3),
            window.msio && window.msio.connected && a.canDetermineWinner()) {
                setTimeout(( () => {
                    C("[Battle] Sending winner request"),
                    window.msio.emit("determine_battle_winner", {
                        room_id: M,
                        battle_id: this.battleId,
                        reason: t,
                        final_scores: e
                    })
                }
                ), "last_standing" === t ? 1e3 : 0),
                this._fallbackTimeout = setTimeout(( () => {
                    if (this._modalShown)
                        return void C("[Battle] Modal already shown, skipping fallback");
                    let i;
                    if (C("[Battle] Server timeout - showing fallback"),
                    this._modalShown = !0,
                    "last_standing" === t)
                        i = e.slice(0, 1);
                    else {
                        const t = Math.max(...e.map((t => t.score)));
                        i = e.filter((e => e.score === t))
                    }
                    this.finalWinners = i,
                    this.showWinnerModal(i)
                }
                ), 5e3)
            }
            return e
        }
        forceHide() {
            C("[Battle] Force hiding UI"),
            this.isActive = !1,
            this.hasEnded = !0,
            this.timer && (clearInterval(this.timer),
            this.timer = null),
            this._fallbackTimeout && (clearTimeout(this._fallbackTimeout),
            this._fallbackTimeout = null),
            this.hide();
            const t = document.getElementById("battle-gift-toggle");
            t && (t.style.display = "none")
        }
        reset() {
            C("[Battle] Performing complete reset"),
            this.isActive = !1,
            this.hasEnded = !1,
            this._modalShown = !1,
            this.players = [],
            this.finalPlayers = null,
            this.finalWinners = null,
            this.timeRemaining = 300,
            this.battleId = null,
            this.endReason = null,
            this.timer && (clearInterval(this.timer),
            this.timer = null),
            this._fallbackTimeout && (clearTimeout(this._fallbackTimeout),
            this._fallbackTimeout = null),
            this.hide();
            const t = document.getElementById("battle-gift-toggle");
            t && (t.style.display = "none");
            const e = document.getElementById("playersContainer");
            e && (e.innerHTML = "");
            const i = document.getElementById("progressBar");
            i && (i.innerHTML = ""),
            C("[Battle] Reset complete - ready for new battle")
        }
        showWinnerModal(t) {
            const e = "last_standing" === this.endReason
              , i = `\n\t\t\t\t<div class="battle-results">\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="confetti-container"></div>\n\t\t\t\t\t${t.map((t => `\n\t\t\t\t<div class="battle-winner-item">\n\t\t\t\t\t<img src="${t.avatar}" class="battle-winner-avatar">\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="battle-winner-info">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="battle-winner-name">ðŸ† ${t.name}</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="battle-winner-points">${t.score} points</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t${e ? '<div class="battle-winner-method">Won by opponent surrender</div>' : ""}\n\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t`)).join("")}\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="battle-all-players">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<h4>Final Scores:</h4>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t ${(this.finalPlayers || this.players).map((t => `\n\t\t\t\t<div class="battle-player-result">\n\t\t\t\t\t<span>${t.name}</span>\n\t\t\t\t\t<span class="battle-player-score">${t.score} pts</span>\n\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t`)).join("")}\n\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t`;
            if (window.MicModal) {
                const n = e ? "Battle Winner! (Surrender)" : t.length > 1 ? "Battle Winners!" : "Battle Winner!";
                window.MicModal.show(n, i),
                setTimeout(( () => {
                    this.triggerConfetti()
                }
                ), 100)
            }
        }
        triggerConfetti() {
            const t = document.querySelector(".confetti-container");
            if (t) {
                for (let e = 0; e < 50; e++) {
                    const e = document.createElement("div");
                    e.className = "confetti";
                    const i = 100 * Math.random()
                      , n = 3 * Math.random()
                      , o = 3 + 2 * Math.random()
                      , s = ["#ffd700", "#ff6b6b", "#4ecdc4", "#45b7d1", "#f093fb", "#4facfe"]
                      , a = s[Math.floor(Math.random() * s.length)];
                    e.style.left = i + "%",
                    e.style.backgroundColor = a,
                    e.style.animationDelay = n + "s",
                    e.style.animationDuration = o + "s",
                    t.appendChild(e)
                }
                setTimeout(( () => {
                    t.innerHTML = ""
                }
                ), 6e3)
            }
        }
        hide() {
            this.container && (this.container.style.display = "none")
        }
    }
    const m = new class {
        constructor(t={}) {
            this.showNotify = t.showNotify || console.log,
            this.log = t.log || console.log,
            this.streams = new Map,
            this.preservedStreams = new Map,
            this.htmlAudioElements = new Map,
            this.audioNodes = new Map,
            this.retryTimers = new Map,
            this.activeStreamIds = new Set,
            this.isClaimingMic = !1,
            this.globalMuted = !1,
            this.isUnlocked = !1,
            this.audioContext = null,
            this.gainNode = null,
            this.deviceInfo = this.detectDevice(),
            this.audioCapabilities = this.checkAudioCapabilities(),
            this.unlockState = {
                audioContextUnlocked: !1,
                htmlAudioUnlocked: !1,
                currentTime: 0,
                currentTimeStuckAt: null,
                prevState: null,
                curState: null
            },
            this.platformConfig = this.getPlatformConfig(),
            this.init()
        }
        detectDevice() {
            const t = navigator.userAgent.toLowerCase()
              , e = /ipad|iphone|ipod/.test(t)
              , i = /android/.test(t)
              , n = e || i || /mobile/.test(t);
            let o = null;
            if (e) {
                const e = t.match(/os (\d+)_(\d+)/);
                o = e ? `${e[1]}.${e[2]}` : null
            } else if (i) {
                const e = t.match(/android (\d+(?:\.\d+)?)/);
                o = e ? e[1] : null
            }
            return {
                isMobile: n,
                isDesktop: !n,
                isIOS: e,
                isAndroid: i,
                osVersion: o,
                browser: this.detectBrowser(t),
                needsSpecialHandling: e && o && parseInt(o.split(".")[0]) < 15
            }
        }
        detectBrowser(t) {
            return t.includes("chrome") ? "chrome" : t.includes("firefox") ? "firefox" : t.includes("safari") ? "safari" : t.includes("edge") ? "edge" : "unknown"
        }
        checkAudioCapabilities() {
            const t = {
                htmlAudio: !1,
                webAudio: !1,
                mediaElement: !1,
                webAudioMediaStreamDest: !1
            };
            try {
                new Audio,
                t.htmlAudio = !0
            } catch (t) {}
            try {
                const e = window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext;
                if (e) {
                    t.webAudio = !0;
                    const i = new e;
                    try {
                        i.createMediaStreamDestination(),
                        t.webAudioMediaStreamDest = !0
                    } catch (t) {}
                    i.close()
                }
            } catch (t) {}
            try {
                document.createElement("video"),
                t.mediaElement = !0
            } catch (t) {}
            return t
        }
        getPlatformConfig() {
            return this.deviceInfo.isIOS ? {
                audioMethod: "html_audio",
                unlockEvents: ["click", "contextmenu", "auxclick", "dblclick", "mousedown", "mouseup", "touchend", "keydown", "keyup"],
                audioAttributes: {
                    "x-webkit-airplay": "deny",
                    disableRemotePlaybook: !0,
                    playsInline: !0,
                    controls: !1,
                    preload: "auto"
                },
                contextResumeStrategy: "aggressive",
                rebuildOnSuspension: this.deviceInfo.needsSpecialHandling
            } : this.deviceInfo.isAndroid ? {
                audioMethod: "html_audio",
                unlockEvents: ["click", "contextmenu", "auxclick", "dblclick", "mousedown", "mouseup", "touchend", "keydown", "keyup"],
                audioAttributes: {
                    playsInline: !0,
                    autoplay: !0,
                    controls: !1,
                    muted: !1,
                    preload: "metadata",
                    crossOrigin: "anonymous"
                },
                contextResumeStrategy: "aggressive",
                rebuildOnSuspension: !1,
                requiresUserGesture: !0,
                audioContextLatency: "interactive",
                forceAudioElementPlayback: !0
            } : {
                audioMethod: "html_audio",
                unlockEvents: ["click", "contextmenu", "auxclick", "dblclick", "mousedown", "mouseup", "touchend", "keydown", "keyup"],
                audioAttributes: {
                    autoplay: !0,
                    controls: !1
                },
                contextResumeStrategy: "minimal",
                rebuildOnSuspension: !1
            }
        }
        async init() {
            try {
                this.setupAudioContext(),
                this.setupUnlockSystem(),
                this.startHealthMonitoring(),
                this.log("[AudioManager] Initialized for platform:", this.deviceInfo),
                this.log("[AudioManager] Audio capabilities:", this.audioCapabilities),
                this.log("[AudioManager] Platform config:", this.platformConfig)
            } catch (t) {
                this.log("[AudioManager] Initialization error:", t)
            }
        }
        setupAudioContext() {
            if (this.audioCapabilities.webAudio)
                try {
                    const t = window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext
                      , e = {};
                    this.deviceInfo.isMobile && (e.latencyHint = "interactive",
                    e.sampleRate = 44100),
                    this.audioContext = new t(e),
                    this.unlockState.curState = this.audioContext.state,
                    this.gainNode = this.audioContext.createGain(),
                    this.gainNode.connect(this.audioContext.destination),
                    this.audioContext.onstatechange = () => {
                        const t = this.unlockState.curState
                          , e = this.audioContext.state;
                        if (this.unlockState.prevState = t,
                        this.unlockState.curState = e,
                        this.log(`[AudioContext] State changed: ${t} -> ${e}`),
                        this.deviceInfo.isIOS) {
                            const i = "running" === e
                              , n = "suspended" === t;
                            "running" === t && "interrupted" === e ? (this.log("[AudioContext] iOS interruption started"),
                            this.handleIOSInterruption(!0)) : (n || "interrupted" === t) && i && (this.log("[AudioContext] iOS interruption ended"),
                            this.handleIOSInterruption(!1))
                        }
                        "running" === e && (this.unlockState.audioContextUnlocked = !0,
                        this.isUnlocked = !0),
                        this.platformConfig.rebuildOnSuspension && "suspended" === e && this.scheduleAudioRebuild()
                    }
                } catch (t) {
                    this.log("[AudioContext] Setup failed:", t),
                    this.audioCapabilities.webAudio = !1
                }
        }
        setupUnlockSystem() {
            let t = !1;
            const e = this.platformConfig.unlockEvents
              , i = async n => {
                if (!t) {
                    t = !0,
                    this.log(`[AudioUnlock] Attempting unlock via ${n?.type || "programmatic"} on ${this.deviceInfo.isAndroid ? "Android" : "iOS"}`);
                    try {
                        this.deviceInfo.isAndroid ? await this.androidSpecificUnlock() : (this.audioContext && "suspended" === this.audioContext.state && (await this.audioContext.resume(),
                        this.log("[AudioUnlock] Audio context resumed")),
                        await this.unlockHTMLAudio()),
                        e.forEach((t => {
                            window.removeEventListener(t, i, {
                                capture: !0,
                                passive: !0
                            }),
                            document.removeEventListener(t, i, {
                                capture: !0,
                                passive: !0
                            })
                        }
                        )),
                        this.isUnlocked = !0,
                        this.log("[AudioUnlock] Unlock completed successfully")
                    } catch (e) {
                        this.log("[AudioUnlock] Unlock failed:", e),
                        t = !1
                    }
                }
            }
            ;
            e.forEach((t => {
                window.addEventListener(t, i, {
                    capture: !0,
                    passive: !0
                }),
                this.deviceInfo.isAndroid && document.addEventListener(t, i, {
                    capture: !0,
                    passive: !0
                })
            }
            )),
            this.audioContext && "running" === this.audioContext.state && i()
        }
        async androidSpecificUnlock() {
            this.log("[AndroidAudio] Starting Android-specific unlock sequence");
            try {
                this.audioContext && "suspended" === this.audioContext.state && (await Promise.race([this.audioContext.resume(), new Promise(( (t, e) => setTimeout(( () => e(new Error("Context resume timeout"))), 2e3)))]),
                this.log("[AndroidAudio] Audio context resumed"));
                const t = document.createElement("audio");
                if (t.autoplay = !0,
                t.playsInline = !0,
                t.controls = !1,
                t.muted = !1,
                t.volume = .01,
                t.preload = "metadata",
                t.style.position = "absolute",
                t.style.left = "-9999px",
                t.style.width = "1px",
                t.style.height = "1px",
                document.body.appendChild(t),
                this.audioContext && this.audioCapabilities.webAudioMediaStreamDest) {
                    const e = this.audioContext.createMediaStreamDestination()
                      , i = this.audioContext.createOscillator()
                      , n = this.audioContext.createGain();
                    i.connect(n),
                    n.connect(e),
                    n.gain.value = .01,
                    i.frequency.value = 440,
                    t.srcObject = e.stream,
                    i.start(),
                    await Promise.race([t.play(), new Promise(( (t, e) => setTimeout(( () => e(new Error("Test audio timeout"))), 2e3)))]),
                    i.stop(),
                    t.pause()
                } else
                    t.src = "data:audio/wav;base64,UklGRnoGAABXQVZFZm10IBAAAAABAAEAQB8AAEAfAAABAAgAZGF0YQoGAACBhYqFbF1fdJivrJBhNjVgodDbq2EcBj+a2/LDciUFLIHO8tiJNwgZaLvt559NEAxQp+PwtmMcBjiR1/LMeSwFJHfH8N2QQAoUXrTp66hVFApGn+DyvmEaAUgAAAA=",
                    await Promise.race([t.play(), new Promise(( (t, e) => setTimeout(( () => e(new Error("Test audio timeout"))), 2e3)))]),
                    t.pause();
                t.parentNode && t.parentNode.removeChild(t),
                this.unlockState.htmlAudioUnlocked = !0,
                this.log("[AndroidAudio] Android unlock sequence completed")
            } catch (t) {
                throw this.log("[AndroidAudio] Android unlock failed:", t),
                t
            }
        }
        async unlockHTMLAudio() {
            if (!this.unlockState.htmlAudioUnlocked)
                try {
                    const t = document.createElement("audio");
                    if (Object.assign(t, this.platformConfig.audioAttributes),
                    this.deviceInfo.isIOS && this.audioContext && this.audioCapabilities.webAudioMediaStreamDest) {
                        const e = this.audioContext.createMediaStreamDestination();
                        t.srcObject = e.stream
                    } else
                        t.src = "data:audio/wav;base64,UklGRnoGAABXQVZFZm10IBAAAAABAAEAQB8AAEAfAAABAAgAZGF0YQoGAACBhYqFbF1fdJivrJBhNjVgodDbq2EcBj+a2/LDciUFLIHO8tiJNwgZaLvt559NEAxQp+PwtmMcBjiR1/LMeSwFJHfH8N2QQAoUXrTp66hVFApGn+DyvmEaAUgAAAA=";
                    t.volume = .01;
                    const e = t.play();
                    e && (await e,
                    t.pause()),
                    this.unlockState.htmlAudioUnlocked = !0,
                    this.log("[AudioUnlock] HTML audio unlocked")
                } catch (t) {
                    this.log("[AudioUnlock] HTML audio unlock failed:", t)
                }
        }
        startHealthMonitoring() {
            setInterval(( () => {
                if (!this.audioContext)
                    return;
                const t = this.audioContext.currentTime;
                this.unlockState.currentTime !== t ? (this.unlockState.currentTimeStuckAt && (this.log("[HealthMonitor] AudioContext current time resumed at", t),
                this.unlockState.currentTimeStuckAt = null),
                this.unlockState.currentTime = t) : t !== this.unlockState.currentTimeStuckAt && (this.log("[HealthMonitor] AudioContext current time stuck at", t),
                this.unlockState.currentTimeStuckAt = t,
                "suspended" === this.audioContext.state && this.audioContext.resume())
            }
            ), 5e3)
        }
        handleIOSInterruption(t) {
            t ? this.log("[iOS] Audio interruption started") : (this.log("[iOS] Audio interruption ended, restoring audio"),
            setTimeout(( () => {
                this.restoreAllAudio()
            }
            ), 100))
        }
        scheduleAudioRebuild() {
            this._rebuildTimeout || (this._rebuildTimeout = setTimeout(( () => {
                this.rebuildAudioConnections(),
                this._rebuildTimeout = null
            }
            ), 1e3))
        }
        async rebuildAudioConnections() {
            this.log("[AudioRebuild] Rebuilding audio connections for iOS compatibility");
            const t = new Map(this.streams);
            this.streams.clear(),
            this.activeStreamIds.clear(),
            this.htmlAudioElements.forEach((t => {
                t.pause(),
                t.srcObject = null
            }
            )),
            this.htmlAudioElements.clear(),
            this.audioNodes.forEach((t => {
                try {
                    t.source.disconnect(),
                    t.gainNode.disconnect()
                } catch (t) {}
            }
            )),
            this.audioNodes.clear();
            for (const [e,i] of t)
                try {
                    await this.addAudioStream(e, i)
                } catch (t) {
                    this.log("[AudioRebuild] Failed to rebuild stream:", e, t)
                }
            this.log("[AudioRebuild] Audio rebuild completed")
        }
        async addAudioStream(t, e) {
            if (this.activeStreamIds.has(t))
                return this.log(`[AudioManager] Stream ${t} already exists, skipping duplicate`),
                !1;
            this.log(`[AudioManager] Adding audio stream ${t} for ${this.deviceInfo.isIOS ? "iOS" : this.deviceInfo.isAndroid ? "Android" : "Desktop"}`),
            this.activeStreamIds.add(t);
            const i = this.platformConfig.audioMethod;
            try {
                return "html_audio" === i ? await this.addWithHTMLAudio(t, e) : await this.addWithWebAudio(t, e),
                this.log(`[AudioManager] Successfully added ${t} with ${i}`),
                this.applyGlobalMuteToStream(t),
                !0
            } catch (n) {
                this.log(`[AudioManager] Primary method ${i} failed, trying fallback:`, n);
                try {
                    return "html_audio" === i ? await this.addWithWebAudio(t, e) : await this.addWithHTMLAudio(t, e),
                    this.log(`[AudioManager] Successfully added ${t} with fallback method`),
                    this.applyGlobalMuteToStream(t),
                    !0
                } catch (e) {
                    return this.log(`[AudioManager] Both methods failed for ${t}:`, e),
                    this.activeStreamIds.delete(t),
                    !1
                }
            }
        }
        handleMobileAudioDucking() {
            this.deviceInfo.isMobile && (this.htmlAudioElements.forEach(( (t, e) => {
                t && g && 1 === v && (t.volume = this.globalMuted ? 0 : 1,
                t.muted = !1,
                t.autoplay = !0,
                this.audioContext && "suspended" === this.audioContext.state && this.audioContext.resume())
            }
            )),
            this.audioNodes.forEach(( (t, e) => {
                t.gainNode && g && 1 === v && (t.gainNode.gain.value = this.globalMuted ? 0 : 1)
            }
            )))
        }
        applyGlobalMuteToStream(t) {
            if (!this.globalMuted)
                return;
            const e = this.htmlAudioElements.get(t);
            e && (e.volume = 0,
            this.log(`[AudioManager] Applied global mute to HTML audio ${t}`));
            const i = this.audioNodes.get(t);
            i && i.gainNode && (i.gainNode.gain.value = 0,
            this.log(`[AudioManager] Applied global mute to Web Audio ${t}`))
        }
        async addWithHTMLAudio(t, e) {
            const i = document.createElement("audio");
            return Object.assign(i, this.platformConfig.audioAttributes),
            i.id = `audio_stream_${t}`,
            i.dataset.streamId = t,
            this.deviceInfo.isAndroid ? (i.autoplay = !0,
            i.playsInline = !0,
            i.controls = !1,
            i.muted = !1,
            e instanceof MediaStream ? i.srcObject = e : (i.crossOrigin = "anonymous",
            i.src = e),
            g && 1 === v ? (i.volume = this.globalMuted ? 0 : 1,
            i.preload = "auto",
            i.autoplay = !0,
            i.muted = !1) : i.volume = this.globalMuted ? 0 : 1,
            i.style.position = "absolute",
            i.style.left = "-9999px",
            i.style.width = "1px",
            i.style.height = "1px",
            document.body.appendChild(i)) : this.deviceInfo.isIOS ? (i.srcObject = e,
            g && 1 === v ? (i.volume = this.globalMuted ? 0 : 1,
            i.setAttribute("webkit-playsinline", "true"),
            i.setAttribute("x-webkit-airplay", "deny")) : i.volume = this.globalMuted ? 0 : 1) : (i.srcObject = e,
            i.volume = this.globalMuted ? 0 : 1),
            new Promise(( (n, o) => {
                let s = !1
                  , a = !1;
                const r = async () => {
                    if (!s && !a) {
                        a = !0,
                        this.log(`[HTMLAudio] Can play ${t} on Android`);
                        try {
                            const o = i.play();
                            o && await o,
                            this.deviceInfo.isMobile && g && 1 === v && setTimeout(( () => {
                                i.volume = this.globalMuted ? 0 : 1
                            }
                            ), 500),
                            s || (s = !0,
                            l(),
                            this.htmlAudioElements.set(t, i),
                            this.streams.set(t, e),
                            this.log(`[HTMLAudio] Android audio playing ${t}`),
                            this.deviceInfo.isMobile && this.startMobileAudioMonitoring(t),
                            n(!0))
                        } catch (a) {
                            this.log(`[HTMLAudio] Android play failed for ${t}:`, a),
                            "NotAllowedError" === a.name ? this.scheduleAndroidAudioUnlock(i, t, e, n, o) : s || (s = !0,
                            l(),
                            o(a))
                        }
                    }
                }
                  , c = () => {
                    this.deviceInfo.isAndroid && !a && (this.log(`[HTMLAudio] Android loaded data for ${t}`),
                    r())
                }
                  , d = e => {
                    s || (s = !0,
                    l(),
                    this.log(`[HTMLAudio] Android error for ${t}:`, e),
                    i.parentNode && i.parentNode.removeChild(i),
                    o(e))
                }
                  , l = () => {
                    i.removeEventListener("canplay", r),
                    i.removeEventListener("canplaythrough", r),
                    i.removeEventListener("loadeddata", c),
                    i.removeEventListener("loadedmetadata", c),
                    i.removeEventListener("error", d)
                }
                ;
                i.addEventListener("canplay", r, {
                    once: !0
                }),
                i.addEventListener("canplaythrough", r, {
                    once: !0
                }),
                i.addEventListener("loadeddata", c, {
                    once: !0
                }),
                i.addEventListener("loadedmetadata", c, {
                    once: !0
                }),
                i.addEventListener("error", d, {
                    once: !0
                });
                setTimeout(( () => {
                    s || (s = !0,
                    l(),
                    i.parentNode && i.parentNode.removeChild(i),
                    this.log(`[HTMLAudio] Android timeout for ${t}`),
                    o(new Error("Android HTML Audio timeout")))
                }
                ), 2e3)
            }
            ))
        }
        startMobileAudioMonitoring(t) {
            if (!this.deviceInfo.isMobile)
                return;
            const e = setInterval(( () => {
                if (!this.htmlAudioElements.has(t))
                    return void clearInterval(e);
                const i = this.htmlAudioElements.get(t);
                i && g && 1 === v && (i.volume < 1 && !this.globalMuted && (i.volume = 1),
                this.audioContext && "suspended" === this.audioContext.state && this.audioContext.resume())
            }
            ), 2e3)
        }
        scheduleAndroidAudioUnlock(t, e, i, n, o) {
            this.log(`[AndroidAudio] Scheduling audio unlock for ${e}`);
            let s = !1;
            const a = ["touchstart", "touchend", "click", "mousedown"]
              , r = async c => {
                if (!s) {
                    s = !0,
                    this.log(`[AndroidAudio] Unlocking via ${c.type} for ${e}`),
                    a.forEach((t => {
                        document.removeEventListener(t, r, {
                            capture: !0
                        })
                    }
                    ));
                    try {
                        await t.play(),
                        this.htmlAudioElements.set(e, t),
                        this.streams.set(e, i),
                        this.log(`[AndroidAudio] Unlocked and playing ${e}`),
                        n(!0)
                    } catch (i) {
                        this.log(`[AndroidAudio] Unlock failed for ${e}:`, i),
                        t.parentNode && t.parentNode.removeChild(t),
                        o(i)
                    }
                }
            }
            ;
            a.forEach((t => {
                document.addEventListener(t, r, {
                    capture: !0,
                    once: !0
                })
            }
            )),
            setTimeout(( () => {
                s || (s = !0,
                a.forEach((t => {
                    document.removeEventListener(t, r, {
                        capture: !0
                    })
                }
                )),
                t.parentNode && t.parentNode.removeChild(t),
                this.log(`[AndroidAudio] Unlock timeout for ${e}`),
                o(new Error("Android audio unlock timeout")))
            }
            ), 5e3)
        }
        async addWithWebAudio(t, e) {
            if (!this.audioContext || !this.audioCapabilities.webAudio)
                throw new Error("Web Audio API not available");
            "suspended" === this.audioContext.state && await this.audioContext.resume();
            const i = this.audioContext.createMediaStreamSource(e)
              , n = this.audioContext.createGain();
            n.gain.value = this.globalMuted ? 0 : 1;
            try {
                i.connect(n),
                n.connect(this.audioContext.destination)
            } catch (t) {
                throw i.disconnect(),
                n.disconnect(),
                t
            }
            return this.audioNodes.set(t, {
                source: i,
                gainNode: n
            }),
            this.streams.set(t, e),
            this.log(`[WebAudio] Added ${t}`),
            !0
        }
        removeAudioStream(t) {
            this.log(`[AudioManager] Removing audio stream ${t}`),
            this.activeStreamIds.delete(t);
            const e = this.htmlAudioElements.get(t);
            e && (e.pause(),
            e.srcObject = null,
            e.parentNode && e.parentNode.removeChild(e),
            this.htmlAudioElements.delete(t));
            const i = this.audioNodes.get(t);
            if (i) {
                try {
                    i.source.disconnect(),
                    i.gainNode.disconnect()
                } catch (t) {}
                this.audioNodes.delete(t)
            }
            this.streams.delete(t)
        }
        async comprehensiveUnlock(t) {
            this.log(`[AudioUnlock] Comprehensive unlock via: ${t}`);
            try {
                return "manual" === t || t.includes("mic") ? (this.isUnlocked = !0,
                !0) : (this.audioContext && "suspended" === this.audioContext.state && await this.audioContext.resume(),
                await this.unlockHTMLAudio(),
                this.isUnlocked = !0,
                !0)
            } catch (t) {
                return this.log("[AudioUnlock] Failed:", t),
                this.isUnlocked = !0,
                !0
            }
        }
        setGlobalMute(t) {
            const e = this.globalMuted;
            this.globalMuted = t,
            this.log(`[AudioManager] Global mute set to: ${t} (was: ${e}) Platform: ${this.deviceInfo.isIOS ? "iOS" : "Other"}`),
            this.deviceInfo.isIOS ? this.handleIOSMuting(t) : this.handleStandardMuting(t),
            this.persistGlobalMuteState(t)
        }
        handleIOSMuting(t) {
            this.log(`[AudioManager] Applying iOS-specific mute: ${t}`),
            this.htmlAudioElements.forEach(( (e, i) => {
                t ? (e.pause(),
                e.muted = !0,
                e.volume = 0) : (e.muted = !1,
                e.volume = 1,
                e.play().catch((t => {
                    this.log(`[AudioManager] iOS audio play failed for ${i}:`, t.message),
                    setTimeout(( () => {
                        e.play().catch(( () => {}
                        ))
                    }
                    ), 500)
                }
                ))),
                this.log(`[AudioManager] iOS HTML Audio ${i}: muted=${e.muted}, volume=${e.volume}, paused=${e.paused}`)
            }
            )),
            this.audioNodes.forEach(( (e, i) => {
                e.gainNode && (t ? e.gainNode.gain.setValueAtTime(0, this.audioContext.currentTime) : e.gainNode.gain.setValueAtTime(1, this.audioContext.currentTime),
                this.log(`[AudioManager] iOS Web Audio ${i} gain set to: ${e.gainNode.gain.value}`))
            }
            )),
            this.audioContext && (t ? this.log("[AudioManager] iOS: Context state during mute:", this.audioContext.state) : "suspended" === this.audioContext.state && this.audioContext.resume().then(( () => {
                this.log("[AudioManager] iOS: Audio context resumed for unmute")
            }
            )).catch((t => {
                this.log("[AudioManager] iOS: Failed to resume audio context:", t.message)
            }
            )))
        }
        handleStandardMuting(t) {
            this.htmlAudioElements.forEach(( (e, i) => {
                e.volume = t ? 0 : 1,
                this.log(`[AudioManager] Updated HTML audio ${i} volume to: ${e.volume}`)
            }
            )),
            this.audioNodes.forEach(( (e, i) => {
                e.gainNode && (e.gainNode.gain.value = t ? 0 : 1,
                this.log(`[AudioManager] Updated Web Audio ${i} gain to: ${e.gainNode.gain.value}`))
            }
            ))
        }
        persistGlobalMuteState(t) {
            const e = t.toString();
            let i = !1;
            try {
                sessionStorage.setItem("global_audio_muted", e),
                i = !0,
                this.log(`[AudioManager] Persisted global mute state via sessionStorage: ${t}`)
            } catch (t) {
                this.log("[AudioManager] sessionStorage failed:", t)
            }
            if (!i)
                try {
                    localStorage.setItem("global_audio_muted", e),
                    i = !0,
                    this.log(`[AudioManager] Persisted global mute state via localStorage: ${t}`)
                } catch (t) {
                    this.log("[AudioManager] localStorage failed:", t)
                }
            if (!i)
                try {
                    window._globalAudioMuted = t,
                    i = !0,
                    this.log(`[AudioManager] Persisted global mute state via window variable: ${t}`)
                } catch (t) {
                    this.log("[AudioManager] window variable fallback failed:", t)
                }
            if (!i)
                try {
                    const e = new URL(window.location);
                    t ? e.searchParams.set("audio_muted", "1") : e.searchParams.delete("audio_muted"),
                    this._urlBackupMuted = t,
                    i = !0,
                    this.log(`[AudioManager] Used URL parameter backup for mute state: ${t}`)
                } catch (t) {
                    this.log("[AudioManager] URL parameter backup failed:", t)
                }
            i || this.log("[AudioManager] WARNING: Failed to persist global mute state with all methods")
        }
        loadGlobalMuteState() {
            let t = null;
            try {
                const e = sessionStorage.getItem("global_audio_muted");
                null !== e && (t = "true" === e,
                this.log(`[AudioManager] Loaded global mute state from sessionStorage: ${t}`))
            } catch (t) {
                this.log("[AudioManager] sessionStorage load failed:", t)
            }
            if (null === t)
                try {
                    const e = localStorage.getItem("global_audio_muted");
                    null !== e && (t = "true" === e,
                    this.log(`[AudioManager] Loaded global mute state from localStorage: ${t}`))
                } catch (t) {
                    this.log("[AudioManager] localStorage load failed:", t)
                }
            if (null === t)
                try {
                    void 0 !== window._globalAudioMuted && (t = window._globalAudioMuted,
                    this.log(`[AudioManager] Loaded global mute state from window variable: ${t}`))
                } catch (t) {
                    this.log("[AudioManager] window variable load failed:", t)
                }
            if (null === t)
                try {
                    const e = new URL(window.location);
                    e.searchParams.has("audio_muted") ? (t = "1" === e.searchParams.get("audio_muted"),
                    this.log(`[AudioManager] Loaded global mute state from URL parameter: ${t}`)) : void 0 !== this._urlBackupMuted && (t = this._urlBackupMuted,
                    this.log(`[AudioManager] Loaded global mute state from URL backup: ${t}`))
                } catch (t) {
                    this.log("[AudioManager] URL parameter load failed:", t)
                }
            return null !== t ? (this.globalMuted = t,
            this.log(`[AudioManager] Applied loaded global mute state: ${t}`),
            t) : (this.log("[AudioManager] No saved global mute state found, defaulting to false"),
            !1)
        }
        isGloballyMuted() {
            return this.globalMuted
        }
        forceHTMLAudioMode() {
            this.log("[AudioManager] Forcing HTML Audio mode"),
            this.platformConfig.audioMethod = "html_audio";
            new Map(this.streams).forEach(( (t, e) => {
                this.removeAudioStream(e),
                setTimeout(( () => {
                    this.addAudioStream(e, t)
                }
                ), 500)
            }
            )),
            this.showNotify("Switched to HTML Audio mode", "info")
        }
        restoreAllAudio() {
            this.log("[AudioManager] Restoring all audio streams"),
            this.audioContext && "suspended" === this.audioContext.state && this.audioContext.resume(),
