            this.deviceInfo.isIOS ? (this.log("[AudioManager] iOS-specific audio restoration"),
            this.htmlAudioElements.forEach(( (t, e) => {
                (t.paused || t.muted) && (this.log(`[AudioManager] Restoring iOS audio ${e}`),
                t.muted = this.globalMuted,
                t.volume = this.globalMuted ? 0 : 1,
                this.globalMuted || t.play().catch((i => {
                    this.log(`[AudioRestore] iOS restore failed for ${e}:`, i),
                    setTimeout(( () => {
                        this.globalMuted || t.play().catch(( () => {
                            this.log(`[AudioRestore] iOS second attempt failed for ${e}`)
                        }
                        ))
                    }
                    ), 1e3)
                }
                )))
            }
            )),
            this.audioNodes.forEach(( (t, e) => {
                if (t.gainNode) {
                    const i = this.globalMuted ? 0 : 1;
                    t.gainNode.gain.setValueAtTime(i, this.audioContext.currentTime),
                    this.log(`[AudioManager] iOS Web Audio ${e} restored to gain: ${i}`)
                }
            }
            ))) : this.htmlAudioElements.forEach(( (t, e) => {
                t.paused && t.play().catch((t => {
                    this.log(`[AudioRestore] Failed to restore ${e}:`, t)
                }
                ))
            }
            ))
        }
        preserveStreamsForMicClaiming() {
            this.log("[AudioManager] Preserving streams for mic claiming"),
            this.isClaimingMic = !0,
            this.preservedStreams.clear(),
            this.streams.forEach(( (t, e) => {
                let i = "unknown";
                this.htmlAudioElements.has(e) ? i = "html_audio" : this.audioNodes.has(e) && (i = "web_audio"),
                this.preservedStreams.set(e, {
                    stream: t,
                    method: i,
                    preservedAt: Date.now()
                }),
                this.log(`[AudioManager] Preserved stream ${e} using method ${i}`)
            }
            )),
            this.log(`[AudioManager] Preserved ${this.preservedStreams.size} streams for mic claiming`)
        }
        restorePreservedStreams() {
            if (this.log("[AudioManager] Restoring preserved streams after mic claiming"),
            0 === this.preservedStreams.size)
                return this.log("[AudioManager] No preserved streams to restore"),
                void (this.isClaimingMic = !1);
            let t = 0;
            const e = [];
            this.preservedStreams.forEach(( (i, n) => {
                if (this.log(`[AudioManager] Restoring stream ${n} with method ${i.method}`),
                this.streams.has(n))
                    return void this.log(`[AudioManager] Stream ${n} already exists, skipping restore`);
                const o = new Promise((e => {
                    setTimeout((async () => {
                        try {
                            "html_audio" === i.method ? await this.addWithHTMLAudio(n, i.stream) : "web_audio" === i.method ? await this.addWithWebAudio(n, i.stream) : await this.addAudioStream(n, i.stream),
                            t++,
                            this.log(`[AudioManager] Successfully restored stream ${n}`),
                            e(!0)
                        } catch (o) {
                            this.log(`[AudioManager] Failed to restore stream ${n}:`, o);
                            try {
                                await this.addAudioStream(n, i.stream),
                                t++,
                                this.log(`[AudioManager] Restored stream ${n} with fallback method`),
                                e(!0)
                            } catch (t) {
                                this.log(`[AudioManager] Failed to restore stream ${n} with fallback:`, t),
                                e(!1)
                            }
                        }
                    }
                    ), 500 * Math.random())
                }
                ));
                e.push(o)
            }
            )),
            Promise.allSettled(e).then(( () => {
                this.log(`[AudioManager] Stream restoration completed: ${t}/${this.preservedStreams.size} restored`),
                this.preservedStreams.clear(),
                this.isClaimingMic = !1,
                t < this.preservedStreams.size && this.showNotify && this.showNotify("Some audio streams could not be restored. You may need to refresh.", "warning")
            }
            ))
        }
        completeCleanup() {
            this.log("[AudioManager] Starting complete cleanup..."),
            this.activeStreamIds.clear(),
            this.preservedStreams.clear(),
            this.htmlAudioElements.forEach(( (t, e) => {
                t.pause(),
                t.srcObject = null,
                t.parentNode && t.parentNode.removeChild(t)
            }
            )),
            this.htmlAudioElements.clear(),
            this.audioNodes.forEach((t => {
                try {
                    t.source.disconnect(),
                    t.gainNode.disconnect()
                } catch (t) {}
            }
            )),
            this.audioNodes.clear(),
            this.streams.clear(),
            this.retryTimers.forEach((t => clearTimeout(t))),
            this.retryTimers.clear(),
            this.log("[AudioManager] Complete cleanup finished")
        }
        gracefulShutdown() {
            this.log("[AudioManager] Graceful shutdown"),
            this._rebuildTimeout && (clearTimeout(this._rebuildTimeout),
            this._rebuildTimeout = null),
            this.completeCleanup(),
            this.audioContext && "closed" !== this.audioContext.state && this.audioContext.close()
        }
        getDebugInfo() {
            return {
                platform: this.deviceInfo,
                config: this.platformConfig,
                streamsCount: this.streams.size,
                htmlElementsCount: this.htmlAudioElements.size,
                webAudioNodesCount: this.audioNodes.size,
                activeStreamIds: Array.from(this.activeStreamIds),
                isUnlocked: this.isUnlocked,
                globalMuted: this.globalMuted,
                isClaimingMic: this.isClaimingMic,
                audioCapabilities: this.audioCapabilities,
                unlockState: this.unlockState,
                audioContextState: this.audioContext?.state
            }
        }
        resumeAllAudio() {
            return this.restoreAllAudio()
        }
        attemptUnlock(t="manual") {
            return this.comprehensiveUnlock(t)
        }
        handleMobileInteraction() {
            return this.deviceInfo.isMobile && !this.isUnlocked ? this.comprehensiveUnlock("mobile_interaction") : Promise.resolve()
        }
        getStatus() {
            return this.getDebugInfo()
        }
    }
      , h = new class {
        constructor() {
            this.micStates = new Map,
            this.userDataCache = new Map,
            this.localMuteStates = new Map,
            this.persistenceKey = null,
            this.isLoading = !1
        }
        initialize(e) {
            this.persistenceKey = `mic_persistent_${t}${e}`,
            this.loadPersistedData()
        }
        cacheUserData(t, e) {
            this.userDataCache.set(String(t), {
                ...e,
                lastSeen: Date.now()
            }),
            this.persistData()
        }
        getCachedUserData(t) {
            return this.userDataCache.get(String(t)) || null
        }
        setLocalMuteState(t, e) {
            this.localMuteStates.set(String(t), e),
            this.persistData(),
            C(`[PersistentState] Set local mute state for mic ${t}: ${e}`)
        }
        getLocalMuteState(t) {
            return this.localMuteStates.get(String(t)) || !1
        }
        setMicState(t, e) {
            if (e && e.user_id) {
                this.cacheUserData(e.user_id, {
                    user_id: e.user_id,
                    user_name: e.user_name,
                    avatar: e.avatar,
                    user_sid: e.user_sid
                });
                const i = g && g == t && e.user_id == user_id ? this.getLocalMuteState(t) : e.isMuted || !1;
                this.micStates.set(String(t), {
                    ...e,
                    isMuted: i,
                    lastUpdated: Date.now(),
                    persistent: !0
                })
            } else
                this.micStates.delete(String(t)),
                this.localMuteStates.delete(String(t));
            this.persistData(),
            this.applyToUI(t, this.micStates.get(String(t)))
        }
        getMicState(t) {
            return this.micStates.get(String(t)) || null
        }
        applyToUI(t, e) {
            e && e.user_id ? this.updateMicUI(t, e) : this.clearMicUI(t)
        }
        applyAllToUI() {
            C("[PersistentState] Applying all states to UI");
            for (let t = 1; t <= (window.mic_count || 10); t++)
                this.clearMicUI(t);
            this.micStates.forEach(( (t, e) => {
                t && t.user_id && this.updateMicUI(e, t)
            }
            )),
            "function" == typeof adjustHeight && setTimeout(( () => adjustHeight()), 200)
        }
        updateMicUI(t, e) {
            const i = $(`#avatar_mic${t}`)
              , n = $(`#name_mic${t}`)
              , o = $(`#muteIcon${t}`);
            if (!i.length)
                return;
            i.html("").append(`<img src="${e.avatar}" class="avatar_mic">`),
            e.user_sid !== f ? i.attr("onclick", `actionAudioUser(${e.user_id})`) : i.attr("onclick", `actionMAudioUser(${e.user_id}, ${t})`),
            o.attr("onclick", `actionMAudioUser(${e.user_id}, ${t})`),
            n.html(`<p style="width:55px;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;">${e.user_name}</p>`);
            const s = e.isMuted || !1;
            s ? o.addClass("show").show() : o.removeClass("show").hide(),
            y[t] = e,
            C(`[PersistentState] Updated UI for mic ${t}: ${e.user_name} (muted: ${s})`)
        }
        clearMicUI(t) {
            $(`#name_mic${t}`).html(t),
            $(`#avatar_mic${t}`).html('<i class="fa fa-microphone"></i>').attr("onclick", "").removeClass("talking"),
            $(`#muteIcon${t}`).removeClass("show").hide(),
            delete y[t]
        }
        persistData() {
            if (this.persistenceKey)
                try {
                    const t = {
                        micStates: {},
                        userCache: {},
                        localMuteStates: {},
                        foldState: this.getFoldState(),
                        timestamp: Date.now()
                    };
                    this.micStates.forEach(( (e, i) => {
                        t.micStates[i] = e
                    }
                    )),
                    this.userDataCache.forEach(( (e, i) => {
                        t.userCache[i] = e
                    }
                    )),
                    this.localMuteStates.forEach(( (e, i) => {
                        t.localMuteStates[i] = e
                    }
                    )),
                    sessionStorage.setItem(this.persistenceKey, JSON.stringify(t))
                } catch (t) {
                    console.warn("[PersistentState] Failed to persist data:", t)
                }
        }
        loadPersistedData() {
            if (this.persistenceKey) {
                try {
                    const t = sessionStorage.getItem(this.persistenceKey);
                    if (t) {
                        const e = JSON.parse(t);
                        if (Date.now() - e.timestamp < 3e5)
                            return Object.keys(e.micStates || {}).forEach((t => {
                                e.micStates[t] && this.micStates.set(t, e.micStates[t])
                            }
                            )),
                            Object.keys(e.userCache || {}).forEach((t => {
                                e.userCache[t] && this.userDataCache.set(t, e.userCache[t])
                            }
                            )),
                            Object.keys(e.localMuteStates || {}).forEach((t => {
                                this.localMuteStates.set(t, e.localMuteStates[t])
                            }
                            )),
                            void 0 !== e.foldState && this.restoreFoldState(e.foldState),
                            C("[PersistentState] Loaded persisted data:", Object.keys(e.micStates || {}).length, "mics"),
                            !0
                    }
                } catch (t) {
                    console.warn("[PersistentState] Failed to load persisted data:", t)
                }
                return !1
            }
        }
        getFoldState() {
            try {
                return "true" === localStorage.getItem("mic_container_folded")
            } catch (t) {
                return !1
            }
        }
        restoreFoldState(t) {
            setTimeout(( () => {
                const e = document.getElementById("room_mic_ui")
                  , i = document.getElementById("mic-container")
                  , n = document.getElementById("fold-icon");
                e && i && n && (t ? (e.classList.add("mic-container-folded"),
                e.classList.remove("mic-container-expanded"),
                setTimeout(( () => {
                    $("#mic-container").slideUp(100)
                }
                ), 2e3)) : (e.classList.add("mic-container-expanded"),
                e.classList.remove("mic-container-folded"),
                setTimeout(( () => {
                    $("#mic-container").slideDown(100)
                }
                ), 2e3)))
            }
            ), 100)
        }
        broadcastMuteState(t, e) {
            S && S.connected && S.emit("user_mute_state", {
                user_id: user_id,
                room_id: k(M),
                mic_id: t,
                is_muted: e,
                user_name: my_username || "User"
            })
        }
        showLoadingUI() {
            const t = document.getElementById("room_mic_ui");
            t && (t.innerHTML = G(window.mic_count, !0))
        }
        hideLoadingUI() {
            const t = document.getElementById("room_mic_ui");
            t && t.innerHTML.includes("fa-spinner") && (t.innerHTML = G(window.mic_count),
            K(),
            P(),
            this.applyAllToUI())
        }
        clearAll() {
            C("[PersistentState] Performing complete state clear"),
            this.micStates.clear(),
            this.userDataCache.clear(),
            this.localMuteStates.clear();
            for (let t = 1; t <= 20; t++)
                this.clearMicUI(t);
            if (Object.keys(y).forEach((t => {
                delete y[t]
            }
            )),
            this.persistenceKey)
                try {
                    sessionStorage.removeItem(this.persistenceKey)
                } catch (t) {}
            C("[PersistentState] Complete state clear finished")
        }
    }

    function k(e) {
        const i = String(e);
        return i.startsWith(t) ? i : t + i
    }
    function C() {
        try {
            console.log.apply(console, ["[AudioSystem]"].concat([].slice.call(arguments)))
        } catch (t) {}
    }
    function T() {
        if (M && S && S.connected) {
            C("[REJOIN] Attempting to rejoin current room:", M);
            try {
                S.emit("rejoin_room_request", {
                    room_id: x(M),
                    user_sid: f,
                    user_id: user_id
                })
            } catch (t) {
                C("[REJOIN] Error sending rejoin request:", t),
                setTimeout(( () => {
                    try {
                        S.emit("set_room_data", {
                            room_id: x(M),
                            user_sid: f || user_id + "-" + Math.floor(1e6 * Math.random()),
                            user_id: user_id
                        })
                    } catch (t) {
                        C("[REJOIN] Fallback rejoin failed:", t)
                    }
                }
                ), 1e3)
            }
        } else
            C("[REJOIN] Cannot rejoin - missing room ID or socket connection")
    }

    }

    function U(t) {
        const e = `; ${document.cookie}`.split(`; ${t}=`);
        return 2 === e.length ? e.pop().split(";").shift() : null
    }
    function L() {
        if (S && S.connected)
            return S;
        if (S && (S.removeAllListeners(),
        S.disconnect()),
        "undefined" == typeof utk || !utk)
            return console.error("[Auth] No token available"),

            return console.error("[Auth] No user_id available"),

            reconnectionDelay: 2e3,

            }
        }),
        window.msio = S,

        }
        )),
        S.on("connect_error", (t => {

        }
        )),
        S.on("disconnect", (t => {
            C("[Socket] Disconnected:", t),
            _ && (clearInterval(_),
            _ = null),
            b && (clearTimeout(b),
            b = null),
            g && H()
        }
        )),
        S.on("battle_state_response", (t => {
            t && t.is_active && (C("[Battle] Received battle state:", t),
            window.battleProgress || (window.battleProgress = new u),
            window.battleProgress.isActive || (window.battleProgress.start(t.players || null, t.time_remaining || 300),
            t.scores && Object.keys(t.scores).forEach((e => {
                const i = t.scores[e];
                i > 0 && window.battleProgress.addPoints(e, i)
            }
            )),
            showNotify("Rejoined active battle", "info")))
        }
        )),
        S.on("battle_state_updated", (t => {
            const e = document.getElementById("battle-gift-toggle");
            e && (e.style.display = t.is_active ? "block" : "none"),
            t.is_active || (C("[Battle] Battle ended - mic claims enabled"),
            setTimeout(( () => {
                showNotify("Battle ended - microphones now available", "info")
            }
            ), 3500)),
            C("[Battle] State updated:", t.is_active ? "ACTIVE" : "INACTIVE")
        }
        )),
        S.on("battle_gift_received", (t => {
            if (C("[GIFT] Battle gift received:", t),
            window.battleProgress && window.battleProgress.isActive) {
                if (window.battleProgress.addPoints) {

                }

                    C("[GIFT] Showing big gift animation"),
                    r(t);
                else {

                    showNotify(`${t.sender_name} sent ${t.gift_title}${n} to ${i}`, "gift", {
                        title: "ðŸŽ Gift Received",
                        duration: 2e3
                    })
                }
            } else
                C("[GIFT] No active battle, ignoring gift")
        }
        )),
        S.off("show_entry_name"),
        S.on("show_entry_name", (t => {
            C("[ENTRY NAME] Got entry name for user:", t),

        }
        )),
        S.on("battle_started", (t => {

        S.on("battle_winner_determined", (t => {
            if (C("[Battle] Server response:", t),
            !window.battleProgress)
                return;
            if (window.battleProgress._modalShown)
                return void C("[Battle] Modal already shown, ignoring duplicate");
            if (!window.battleProgress.isActive && window.battleProgress.hasEnded)
                return void C("[Battle] Battle already processed, ignoring duplicate");
            window.battleProgress._fallbackTimeout && (clearTimeout(window.battleProgress._fallbackTimeout),
            window.battleProgress._fallbackTimeout = null),
            window.battleProgress._modalShown = !0,
            window.battleProgress.isActive = !1,
            window.battleProgress.hasEnded = !0,
            window.battleProgress.timer && (clearInterval(window.battleProgress.timer),
            window.battleProgress.timer = null),
            window.battleProgress._stopMonitoring = !0;
            const e = t.all_players || []
              , i = t.winners || [];
            C("[Battle] Winners from server:", i.map((t => `${t.name}(${t.score})`))),
            window.battleProgress.finalPlayers = e,
            window.battleProgress.finalWinners = i,
            setTimeout(( () => {
                0 === i.length ? window.battleProgress.showDrawModal(null) : 1 === i.length ? window.battleProgress.showWinnerModal(i) : window.battleProgress.showDrawModal(i)
            }
            ), 1e3)
        }
        )),
        S.on("battle_invite_received", (t => {

              , i = t.initiator_id == e;

        }

        S.on("reconnect", ( () => {
            C("[Socket] Reconnected successfully"),

                h.applyAllToUI();

            k(t.room_id) === k(M) && h.setMicState(t.micId, t)
        }

                t[e] && t[e].user_id ? h.setMicState(e, {
                    ...t[e],

                }) : h.setMicState(e, null)

        S.on("room_data_updated", (t => {
            k(t.room_id) === k(M) && function(t) {

                window.mic_rank = t.mic_rank,

                    title: "Room Update"

                        title: "Microphone Requirement Update"
                    })
                }

        }
        )),

                e && e.user_id == t.user_id && h.setMicState(t.mic_id, {

                i && i.user_sid === t.user_sid && (C("[UserLeft] Clearing mic slot", e, "for departed user"),
                h.setMicState(e, null))
            }

        S.on("show_emoji", (t => {

        S.on("heartbeat_ack", (t => {
            console.log("[HEARTBEAT] Received heartbeat ack:", t),
            b && (clearTimeout(b),
            b = null),
            t && t.error && (console.warn("[HEARTBEAT] Server reported error:", t.error),
            "activity_update_failed" === t.error && setTimeout(( () => {
                T()
            }
            ), 2e3))
        }
        )),
        S.on("server_maintenance", (t => {
            console.warn("[SERVER] Maintenance notification:", t),
            "worker_restart_failed" === t.type ? showNotify("Audio services temporarily unavailable. Please refresh your page.", "error", {
                title: "Server Maintenance",
                persistent: !0,
                actions: [{
                    text: "Refresh Page",
                    onclick: "location.reload()",

                }]

                title: "Service Restored"
            }),
            setTimeout(( () => {
                V()
            }
            ), 2e3))
        }
        )),
        S.on("rejoin_room_needed", (t => {
            console.warn("[REJOIN] Server requesting room rejoin:", t),
            showNotify("Reconnecting to room...", "info", {
                title: "Reconnecting"
            }),
            setTimeout(( () => {
                T()
            }
            ), 1e3)
        }
        )),
        S.on("rejoin_room_response", (t => {
            t.success ? (console.log("[REJOIN] Successfully rejoined room:", t.room_id),
            showNotify("Reconnected to room successfully", "success"),
            setTimeout(( () => {
                V()
            }
            ), 1e3)) : (console.error("[REJOIN] Failed to rejoin room:", t.error),
            showNotify("Failed to reconnect to room. Please refresh the page.", "error", {
                persistent: !0,
                actions: [{
                    text: "Refresh Page",
                    onclick: "location.reload()",
                    type: "primary"
                }]
            }))
        }
        )),
        S.on("inactivity_warning", (t => {
            console.warn("[INACTIVITY] Warning received:", t);
            const e = Math.ceil(t.timeRemaining / 6e4);
            showNotify(`You will be disconnected in ${e} minutes due to inactivity. Move your mouse or click to stay connected.`, "warning", {
                title: "Inactivity Warning",
                duration: 1e4,
                actions: [{
                    text: "I'm Here",
                    onclick: "window.confirmUserActive()",
                    type: "primary"
                }]
            })
        }
        )),
        S.on("admin_wipe_slot", (t => {
            k(t.uroom) === k(M) && window.user_id == t.uId && (leaveMyMic(),
            showNotify("You were removed from the microphone by " + t.staff, "error"))
        }
        )),
        S.on("user_banned_from_mic", (t => {
            k(t.room_id) === k(M) && (showNotify(`${t.username} has been banned from microphones by ${t.staff_name}`, "warning"),
            t.user_id == user_id && showNotify("You have been banned from using microphones in this room", "error", {
                title: "Microphone Ban",
                duration: 1e4
            }))
        }
        )),
        S.on("user_unbanned_from_mic", (t => {
            if (k(t.room_id) === k(M)) {
                showNotify(`${t.username} has been unbanned from microphones by ${t.staff_name}`, "success"),
                t.user_id == user_id && showNotify("You can now use microphones in this room again", "success", {
                    title: "Microphone Access Restored",
                    duration: 8e3
                });
                const e = document.getElementById("micModalBody");
                e && e.querySelector(".mic-ban-list") && MicModal.showBannedUsers()
            }
        }
        )),
        S.on("banned_users_list", (t => {
            k(t.room_id) === k(M) && window.MicModal && "function" == typeof window.MicModal.displayBannedUsers && window.MicModal.displayBannedUsers(t.banned_users)
        }
        )),
        S.on("ban_operation_error", (t => {
            showNotify(t.message || "Ban operation failed", "error")
        }
        )),
        S.on("force_html_audio_mode", (t => {
            k(t.room_id) === k(M) && t.user_sid !== f && setTimeout(( () => m.forceHTMLAudioMode()), 300)
        }
        )),
        S.on("mic_invite_received", (t => {
            const {invite_id: e, room_id: i, from_user_id: n, from_user_name: o, expires_at: s} = t;
            if (C("[MIC_INVITE] Received invite from", o, "invite_id:", e),
            k(i) !== k(M))
                return void C("[MIC_INVITE] Invite ignored - different room");
            s - Date.now() <= 0 ? C("[MIC_INVITE] Invite expired") : MicModal.showInvite({
                invite_id: e,
                room_id: i,
                from_user_id: n,
                from_user_name: o,
                expires_at: s
            })
        }
        )),
        S.on("mic_invite_accepted_slot", (async t => {
            const {invite_id: e, slot_id: i, room_id: n} = t;
            if (C("[MIC_INVITE] Invite accepted, assigned slot:", i),
            1 === v)
                return void showNotify("You are already on a microphone", "warning");
            const o = $("#avatar_mic" + i);
            if (o.length) {
                const t = o.html();
                o.html('<i class="fa fa-spinner fa-spin"></i>');
                try {
                    await j(i);
                    const t = {
                        micId: i,
                        room_id: k(n),
                        avatar: $(".glob_av").attr("src") || "",
                        user_name: my_username || "User",
                        user_id: user_id,
                        user_sid: f
                    };
                    h.setMicState(i, t),
                    g = i,
                    v = 1,
                    showNotify("Successfully joined microphone", "success")
                } catch (e) {
                    o.html(t),
                    showNotify("Failed to join microphone", "error")
                }
            }
        }
        )),
        S.on("mic_invite_sent", (t => {
            C("[MIC_INVITE] Invite sent successfully:", t.invite_id)
        }
        )),
        S.on("mic_invite_error", (t => {
            showNotify(t.message || "Failed to send microphone invite", "error")
        }
        )),
        S.on("mic_invite_declined", (t => {
            showNotify("User declined your invite", "error")
        }
        )),
        S
    }
    function R(t, e) {
        return new Promise(( (i, n) => {
            if (!S || !S.connected)
                return n("Socket not connected");
            e && !e.channelId && (e.channelId = k(M)),
            S.emit(t, e, (t => {
                if (!t || t.error)
                    return n(t?.error || "No response");
                i(t)
            }
            ))
        }
        ))
    }
    function D() {
        return p.device && p.device.loaded ? Promise.resolve(p.device) : window.mediasoupClient ? (p.device = new window.mediasoupClient.Device,
        R("ms::getRouterRtpCapabilities", {
            channelId: k(M)
        }).then((t => {
            if (!t.routerRtpCapabilities)
                throw new Error("Invalid router RTP capabilities received");
            return p.device.load({
                routerRtpCapabilities: t.routerRtpCapabilities
            })
        }
        )).then(( () => {
            if (!p.device.loaded)
                throw new Error("Device failed to load properly");
            return C("[Device] MediaSoup device loaded successfully"),
            p.device
        }
        )).catch((t => {
            throw C("[Device] Error loading device:", t),
            p.device = null,
            t
        }
        ))) : Promise.reject("mediasoup-client missing")
    }
    function O() {
        return p.recvTransport && !p.recvTransport.closed ? Promise.resolve(p.recvTransport) : D().then(( () => {
            if (!p.device || !p.device.loaded)
                throw new Error("Device not loaded before creating recv transport");
            return R("ms::createTransport", {
                channelId: k(M),
                direction: "recv"
            })
        }
        )).then((t => {
            if (!t)
                throw new Error("Invalid transport options received");
            return C("[Transport] Creating recv transport with options:", Object.keys(t)),
            p.recvTransport = p.device.createRecvTransport(t),
            p.recvTransport.on("connect", ( ({dtlsParameters: t}, e, i) => {
                R("ms::connectTransport", {
                    transportId: p.recvTransport.id,
                    dtlsParameters: t,
                    channelId: k(M)
                }).then(e).catch(i)
            }
            )),
            p.recvTransport.on("connectionstatechange", (t => {
                C("[RecvTransport] Connection state changed to:", t),
                "failed" !== t && "disconnected" !== t || p.recvTransport && "failed" === p.recvTransport.connectionState && (p.recvTransport = null)
            }
            )),
            p.recvTransport
        }
        ))
    }
    function j(t) {
        return console.log("[StartMic] STEP 1: Starting microphone for slot:", t),
        w = !1,
        console.log("[StartMic] STEP 0: Preserving existing audio streams..."),
        m && (m.preserveStreamsForMicClaiming(),
        console.log("[StartMic] STEP 0: Audio streams preserved, count:", m.streams.size)),
        new Promise((async (t, e) => {
            try {
                if (!navigator.mediaDevices || !navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia)
                    throw new Error("MediaDevices API not supported in this browser");
                try {
                    const t = (await navigator.mediaDevices.enumerateDevices()).filter((t => "audioinput" === t.kind));
                    if (C("[MIC] Found", t.length, "audio input devices"),
                    0 === t.length)
                        throw new Error("No microphone devices found");
                    t.forEach(( (t, e) => {
                        C(`[MIC] Device ${e}: ${t.label || "Unknown"} (${t.deviceId})`)
                    }
                    ))
                } catch (t) {
                    C("[MIC] Device enumeration failed:", t.message)
                }
                const e = [{
                    echoCancellation: !0,
                    noiseSuppression: !0,
                    autoGainControl: !0,
                    sampleRate: 48e3,
                    channelCount: 1
                }, {
                    echoCancellation: !0,
                    noiseSuppression: !0,
                    autoGainControl: !0
                }, {
                    echoCancellation: !1,
                    noiseSuppression: !1,
                    autoGainControl: !1
                }, !0];
                let i = null
                  , n = null;
                for (let o = 0; o < e.length; o++)
                    try {
                        C(`[MIC] Trying audio constraint set ${o + 1}/${e.length}`),
                        i = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({
                            video: !1,
                            audio: e[o]
                        });
                        const n = i.getAudioTracks();
                        if (0 === n.length)
                            throw new Error("Stream has no audio tracks");
                        const s = n[0];
                        if (C(`[MIC] Got microphone stream: ${s.label || "Unknown"} (${s.kind})`),
                        C("[MIC] Stream settings:", JSON.stringify(s.getSettings())),
                        "live" !== s.readyState)
                            throw new Error(`Track state is ${s.readyState}, expected 'live'`);
                        return n.forEach((t => t.stop())),
                        C("[MIC] Microphone permission granted successfully"),
                        void t(!0)
                    } catch (t) {
                        n = t,
                        C(`[MIC] Constraint set ${o + 1} failed:`, t.message),
                        i && (i.getTracks().forEach((t => t.stop())),
                        i = null)
                    }
                throw n || new Error("All microphone attempts failed")
            } catch (t) {
                C("[MIC] Permission request failed:", t);
                let i = "Failed to access microphone";
                "NotAllowedError" === t.name ? i = "Microphone permission denied. Please allow microphone access and try again." : "NotFoundError" === t.name ? i = "No microphone found. Please connect a microphone or headset and try again." : "NotReadableError" === t.name ? i = "Microphone is being used by another application. Please close other apps and try again." : "OverconstrainedError" === t.name ? i = "Your microphone does not meet the required specifications. Try using a different microphone." : t.message.includes("not supported") && (i = "Your browser does not support microphone access. Please use a modern browser."),
                e(new Error(i))
            }
        }
        )).then(( () => (console.log("[StartMic] STEP 2: Mic permission granted"),
        console.log("[StartMic] STEP 3: Skipping audio unlock for mic claiming"),
        m && (m.isUnlocked = !0),
        Promise.resolve()))).then(( () => (console.log("[StartMic] STEP 4: Ensuring send transport..."),
        p.sendTransport && !p.sendTransport.closed ? Promise.resolve(p.sendTransport) : D().then(( () => {
            if (!p.device || !p.device.loaded)
                throw new Error("Device not loaded before creating send transport");
            return R("ms::createTransport", {
                channelId: k(M),
                direction: "send"
            })
        }
        )).then((t => {
            if (!t)
                throw new Error("Invalid transport options received");
            return C("[Transport] Creating send transport with options:", Object.keys(t)),
            p.sendTransport = p.device.createSendTransport(t),
            p.sendTransport.on("connect", ( ({dtlsParameters: t}, e, i) => {
                R("ms::connectTransport", {
                    transportId: p.sendTransport.id,
                    dtlsParameters: t,
                    channelId: k(M)
                }).then(e).catch(i)
            }
            )),
            p.sendTransport.on("produce", ( ({kind: t, rtpParameters: e}, i, n) => {
                R("ms::produce", {
                    channelId: k(M),
                    transportId: p.sendTransport.id,
                    kind: t,
                    rtpParameters: e
                }).then(( ({producerId: t}) => i({
                    id: t
                }))).catch(n)
            }
            )),
            p.sendTransport.on("connectionstatechange", (t => {
                C("[SendTransport] Connection state changed to:", t),
                "failed" !== t && "disconnected" !== t || p.sendTransport && "failed" === p.sendTransport.connectionState && (p.sendTransport = null)
            }
            )),
            p.sendTransport
        }
        ))))).then((async () => {
            console.log("[StartMic] STEP 5: Send transport ready, requesting user media...");
            if (/android|webos|iphone|ipad|ipod|blackberry|iemobile|opera mini/i.test(navigator.userAgent.toLowerCase()))
                return console.log("[StartMic] Mobile device detected - using saved preferences"),
                getUserMediaWithPreferences().catch((async t => (console.log("[StartMic] Mobile saved preferences failed, trying fallback:", t.message),
                navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({
                    video: !1,
                    audio: {
                        echoCancellation: !0,
                        noiseSuppression: !0,
                        autoGainControl: !0
                    }
                }))));
            console.log("[StartMic] Desktop device detected - selecting best microphone...");
            try {
                // قراءة الإعدادات المحفوظة
                const savedDeviceId = localStorage.getItem('audio_device_id');
                
                if (savedDeviceId) {
                    // إذا كان هناك جهاز محفوظ، استخدمه مباشرة
                    console.log("[StartMic] Using saved device ID:", savedDeviceId);
                    return getUserMediaWithPreferences();
                }
                
                // إذا لم يكن هناك جهاز محفوظ، اختر أفضل جهاز
                const t = (await navigator.mediaDevices.enumerateDevices()).filter((t => "audioinput" === t.kind && "default" !== t.deviceId));
                console.log("[StartMic] Available audio inputs:", t.map((t => ({
                    label: t.label,
                    deviceId: t.deviceId
                }))));
                let e = null;
                if (t.length > 0) {
                    const i = ["headset", "headphone", "usb", "wireless", "bluetooth", "external", "gaming", "stereo", "microphone", "corsair", "logitech", "razer", "hyperx", "steelseries", "sennheiser", "audio-technica", "plantronics", "jabra", "bose", "sony"]
                      , n = ["built-in", "internal", "array", "integrated", "default", "laptop", "webcam", "camera", "realtek", "conexant"]
                      , o = t.map((t => {
                        const e = t.label.toLowerCase();
                        let o = 0;
                        return i.forEach((t => {
                            e.includes(t) && (o += 10)
                        }
                        )),
                        n.forEach((t => {
                            e.includes(t) && (o -= 5)
                        }
                        )),
                        e.length > 20 && (o += 2),
                        (e.includes("usb") || e.includes("wireless") || e.includes("bluetooth")) && (o += 15),
                        {
                            device: t,
                            score: o,
                            label: e
                        }
                    }
                    ));
                    o.sort(( (t, e) => e.score - t.score)),
                    console.log("[StartMic] Device scores:", o.map((t => ({
                        label: t.label,
                        score: t.score
                    })))),
                    o[0].score > 0 ? (e = o[0].device.deviceId,
                    console.log("[StartMic] Selected headset/external mic:", o[0].label)) : console.log("[StartMic] No clear headset detected, using browser default")
                }
                
                // حفظ الجهاز المختار إذا وجد
                if (e) {
                    localStorage.setItem('audio_device_id', e);
                }
                
                // استخدام الإعدادات المحفوظة مع الجهاز المختار
                return getUserMediaWithPreferences();
            } catch (t) {
                return console.log("[StartMic] Device enumeration failed, using saved preferences:", t.message),
                getUserMediaWithPreferences()
            }
        }
        )).catch((async t => (console.log("[StartMic] Primary getUserMedia failed, trying saved preferences fallback:", t.message),
        getUserMediaWithPreferences().catch((async e => (console.log("[StartMic] Saved preferences also failed, trying universal fallback:", e.message),
        navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({
            video: !1,
            audio: {
                echoCancellation: !0,
                noiseSuppression: !0,
                autoGainControl: !0
            }
        }))))))).then((e => {
            console.log("[StartMic] STEP 6: Got microphone stream:", e.id);
            const i = e.getAudioTracks();
            if (0 === i.length)
                throw new Error("Stream has no audio tracks");
            const n = i[0];
            return console.log("[StartMic] Audio track info:", {
                label: n.label,
                kind: n.kind,
                readyState: n.readyState,
                enabled: n.enabled,
                muted: n.muted
            }),
            p.localStream = e,
            z(!0),
            e.getAudioTracks().forEach((e => {
                e.addEventListener("ended", ( () => {
                    console.log("[StartMic] Audio track ended, cleaning up..."),
                    g === t && (H(),
                    g = null,
                    v = 0,
                    z(!1))
                }
                ))
            }
            )),
            console.log("[StartMic] STEP 7: Creating producer..."),
            p.sendTransport.produce({
                track: e.getAudioTracks()[0],
                codecOptions: {
                    opusStereo: parseInt(localStorage.getItem('audio_channel_count') || '1') === 2 ? 1 : 0,
                    opusDtx: 1,
                    opusFec: 1
                }
            })
        }
        )).then((e => (console.log("[StartMic] STEP 8: Producer created:", e.id),
        p.producer = e,
        e.on("transportclose", ( () => {
            console.log("[StartMic] Producer transport closed"),
            p.producer = null,
            H(),
            z(!1)
        }
        )),
        e.on("trackended", ( () => {
            console.log("[StartMic] Producer track ended"),
            H(),
            p.producer = null,
            z(!1)
        }
        )),
        console.log("[StartMic] STEP 9: Claiming mic slot on server..."),
        R("ms::claimMic", {
            channelId: k(M),
            slotId: t,
            producerId: e.id,
            avatar: $(".glob_av").attr("src") || "",
            user_name: my_username || "User",
            user_id: user_id
        })))).then((e => {
            console.log("[StartMic] STEP 10: Mic claimed successfully:", e),
            g = t,
            v = 1,
            console.log("[StartMic] STEP 11: Microphone setup complete for slot:", t);
            const i = {
                micId: t,
                room_id: k(M),
                avatar: $(".glob_av").attr("src") || "",
                user_name: my_username || "User",
                user_id: user_id,
                user_sid: f
            };
            h && h.setMicState(t, i);
            $("#avatar_mic" + t).html(`<img src="${$(".glob_av").attr("src") || ""}" class="avatar_mic">`),
            console.log("[StartMic] STEP 12: Restoring preserved audio streams..."),
            setTimeout(( () => {
                m && (m.restorePreservedStreams(),
                console.log("[StartMic] Audio streams restored after mic claiming"),
                setTimeout(( () => {
                    const t = m.getDebugInfo();
                    console.log("[StartMic] Audio status after restore:", {
                        streamsCount: t.streamsCount,
                        htmlAudioCount: t.htmlElementsCount,
                        webAudioCount: t.webAudioNodesCount
                    }),
                    0 === t.streamsCount && p.consumers.size > 0 && (console.log("[StartMic] No audio streams after restore, re-initializing..."),
                    setTimeout(( () => {
                        V()
                    }
                    ), 1e3))
                }
                ), 1e3))
            }
            ), 1500),
            setTimeout(( () => {
                S && S.connected && S.emit("force_html_audio_mode", {
                    room_id: k(M),
                    user_sid: f
                })
            }
            ), 2e3),
            console.log("[StartMic] SUCCESS: Mic claimed successfully"),
            showNotify("Successfully joined microphone", "success")
        }
        )).catch((e => {
            console.error("[StartMic] ERROR at some step:", e),
            console.error("[StartMic] Error stack:", e.stack),
            console.log("[StartMic] Restoring audio streams after error..."),
            m && m.restorePreservedStreams(),
            H(),
            z(!1);
            $("#avatar_mic" + t).html('<i class="fa fa-microphone"></i>');
            let i = "Failed to join microphone";
            throw "NotAllowedError" === e.name || e.message.includes("permission denied") ? i = "Microphone permission denied" : "NotFoundError" === e.name || e.message.includes("No microphone") ? i = "No microphone device found" : ("NotReadableError" === e.name || e.message.includes("being used")) && (i = "Microphone is being used by another application"),
            showNotify(i, "error", {
                title: "Microphone Error",
                duration: 5e3
            }),
            e
        }
        ))
    }
    function H() {
        if (console.log("[CleanupLocalMic] Starting cleanup..."),
        p.localStream && (console.log("[CleanupLocalMic] Stopping", p.localStream.getTracks().length, "tracks"),
        p.localStream.getTracks().forEach(( (t, e) => {
            console.log(`[CleanupLocalMic] Stopping track ${e}:`, t.kind, t.readyState),
            t.stop()
        }
        )),
        p.localStream = null,
        console.log("[CleanupLocalMic] Local stream cleared")),
        p.producer) {
            try {
                p.producer.close(),
                console.log("[CleanupLocalMic] Producer closed")
            } catch (t) {
                console.error("[CleanupLocalMic] Error closing producer:", t)
            }
            p.producer = null
        }
        m && m.deviceInfo.isMobile && setTimeout(( () => {
            m.restoreAllAudio(),
            console.log("[CleanupLocalMic] Mobile audio levels restored")
        }
        ), 500),
        console.log("[CleanupLocalMic] Cleanup complete")
    }
    function q() {
        if (!window.battleProgress || !window.battleProgress.isActive || window.battleProgress.hasEnded || window.battleProgress._stopMonitoring)
            return;
        const t = window.battleProgress.checkActivePlayers()
          , e = [];
        window.battleProgress.players.forEach((i => {
            t.find((t => t.id === i.id)) || e.push(i)
        }
        )),
        e.length > 0 && (C("[Battle] Batch removing", e.length, "players"),
        e.forEach((t => {
            window.battleProgress.removePlayer(t.id)
        }
        )))
    }
    function F(t) {
        const {producerId: e, slotId: i, user_sid: n} = t;
        return n === f ? Promise.resolve() : p.consumers.has(e) ? (C("[ConsumeProducer] Producer already being consumed:", e),
        Promise.resolve()) : (C("[ConsumeProducer] Starting consumption of producer:", e, "for slot:", i),
        O().then(( () => R("ms::consume", {
            channelId: k(M),
            producerId: e,
            rtpCapabilities: p.device.rtpCapabilities
        }))).then((t => p.recvTransport.consume({
            id: t.id,
            producerId: t.producerId,
            kind: t.kind,
            rtpParameters: t.rtpParameters
        }))).then((t => {
            const o = new MediaStream([t.track]);
            return p.consumers.has(e) ? (C("[ConsumeProducer] Producer was already consumed during operation:", e),
            void t.close()) : (p.consumers.set(e, {
                consumer: t,
                slotId: i,
                user_sid: n,
                stream: o
            }),
            t.on("transportclose", ( () => {
                C("[ConsumeProducer] Transport closed for producer:", e),
                W(e)
            }
            )),
            t.on("producerclose", ( () => {
                C("[ConsumeProducer] Producer closed:", e),
                W(e)
            }
            )),
            R("ms::resume", {
                consumerId: t.id,
                channelId: k(M)
            }).then(( () => {
                const i = () => {
                    "live" === t.track.readyState ? (C("[ConsumeProducer] Track is live, adding to audio manager:", e),
                    m.addAudioStream(e, o)) : "ended" === t.track.readyState ? (C("[ConsumeProducer] Track ended before becoming live:", e),
                    W(e)) : setTimeout(i, 200)
                }
                ;
                i()
            }
            )))
        }
        )).catch((t => {
            C("Error consuming producer:", e, t.message),
            p.consumers.has(e) && W(e)
        }
        )))
    }
    function W(t) {
        const e = p.consumers.get(t);
        if (e) {
            C("[DetachConsumer] Removing consumer for producer:", t);
            try {
                e.consumer.close()
            } catch (t) {
                C("[DetachConsumer] Error closing consumer:", t.message)
            }
            m.removeAudioStream(t),
            p.consumers.delete(t)
        }
    }
    function z(t) {
        const e = document.querySelectorAll('[id^="avatar_mic"]');
        t ? document.title = document.title.includes("ðŸŽ¤") ? document.title : "ðŸŽ¤ " + document.title : (document.title = document.title.replace("ðŸŽ¤ ", ""),
        e.forEach((t => {
            t.style.border = "none"
        }
        )))
    }
    function Y() {
        f = f || user_id + "-" + Math.floor(1e6 * Math.random());
        try {
            window.socket && window.socket.emit("join_rooma", {
                room_id: M,
                user_sid: f,
                user_id: user_id,
                user_rank: user_rank,
                user_role: user_role,
                mic_count: mic_count,
                mic_rank: mic_rank
            })
        } catch (t) {}
        S && S.connected && (S.emit("set_room_data", {
            room_id: k(M),
            user_sid: f,
            user_id: user_id
        }),
        setTimeout(( () => {
            S.emit("get_battle_state", {
                room_id: k(M)
            }, (t => {
                if (t && t.is_active) {
                    if (C("[Battle] Server says battle is active"),
                    t.time_remaining < 15)
                        return void C("[Battle] Battle ending soon (<15s), not restoring UI");
                    if (window.battleProgress && window.battleProgress.isActive && !window.battleProgress.hasEnded)
                        return void C("[Battle] Battle already active, skipping restoration");
                    window.battleProgress || (window.battleProgress = new u),
                    (window.battleProgress.isActive || window.battleProgress.hasEnded) && (C("[Battle] Resetting existing battle state before restoration"),
                    window.battleProgress.reset()),
                    C("[Battle] Starting battle restoration...");
                    if (!window.battleProgress.start(t.players || null, t.time_remaining))
                        return void C("[Battle] Failed to restore battle");
                    setTimeout(( () => {
                        t.scores && (C("[Battle] Restoring scores:", t.scores),
                        Object.keys(t.scores).forEach((e => {
                            const i = t.scores[e];
                            i > 0 && window.battleProgress.addPoints(e, i)
                        }
                        ))),
                        showNotify("Rejoined active battle", "info"),
                        C("[Battle] Battle restored successfully")
                    }
                    ), 500)
                }
            }
            ))
        }
        ), 3e3),
        setTimeout(( () => {
            V()
        }
        ), 1e3))
    }
    function V() {
        C("[Init] Starting MediaSoup initialization..."),
        O().then(( () => (C("[Init] Recv transport ready, listing producers..."),
        R("ms::listProducers", {
            channelId: k(M)
        })))).then((t => {
            const e = t.list || [];
            C("[Init] Found", e.length, "producers to consume");
            const i = [];
            return e.forEach((t => {
                p.consumers.has(t.producerId) || (C("[Init] Starting consumption of producer:", t.producerId),
                i.push(F(t).catch((e => {
                    C("[Init] Failed to consume producer", t.producerId, ":", e.message)
                }
                ))))
            }
            )),
            Promise.allSettled(i)
        }
        )).then((t => {
            C("[Init] MediaSoup initialization completed:", t.filter((t => "fulfilled" === t.status)).length, "successful,", t.filter((t => "rejected" === t.status)).length, "failed"),
 setTimeout((()=>{
    // استعادة حالة الكتم من الجلسة أولاً
    const savedMuted = sessionStorage.getItem('audio_global_muted_backup');
    if (savedMuted !== null) {
        const shouldBeMuted = savedMuted === 'true';
        m.setGlobalMute(shouldBeMuted);
        P();
        console.log('[Init] Restored mute from session:', shouldBeMuted);
    } else if (m.loadGlobalMuteState()) {
        m.setGlobalMute(!0);
        P();
        console.log('[Init] Restored global mute state after initialization');
    }
    
    // استعادة الصوت
    m.resumeAllAudio();
    
    // إعادة تطبيق حالات المايك
    if (h && typeof h.applyAllToUI === 'function') {
        h.applyAllToUI();
    }
}),1e3)
        }
        )).catch((t => {
            C("[Init] Error initializing MediaSoup:", t.message),
            setTimeout(( () => {
                C("[Init] Attempting recovery..."),
                p.device = null,
                p.recvTransport = null,
                p.sendTransport = null,
                setTimeout(( () => {
                    V()
                }
                ), 3e3)
            }
            ), 1e3)
        }
        ))
    }
    function X(t) {
        const e = window.mic_count || 0;
        if (t !== e) {
            if (t < e)
                for (let i = e; i > t; i--) {
                    const t = h.getMicState(i);
                    t && t.user_id && g == i && msLeaveMyMic(i),
                    h.setMicState(i, null)
                }
            window.mic_count = t,
            J(t)
        }
    }
    function Q(t, e, i) {
        return new Promise(( (n, o) => {
            try {
                const o = window.mic_count || 0
                  , s = i && i !== M;
                if (s && (C("[UpdateMicCount] Room switch detected - forcing user mic cleanup"),
                g && (C("[UpdateMicCount] User was on mic", g, "clearing state for room switch"),
                H(),
                g = null,
                v = 0,
                w = !1,
                z(!1)),
                p.consumers.forEach(( (t, e) => {
                    try {
                        t.consumer.closed || t.consumer.close()
                    } catch (t) {}
                    m.removeAudioStream(e)
                }
                )),
                p.consumers.clear(),
                m.completeCleanup()),
                0 === t) {
                    g && !s && (C("[UpdateMicCount] Entering room with 0 mics - clearing user mic state"),
                    H(),
                    g = null,
                    v = 0,
                    w = !1,
                    z(!1));
                    for (let t = 1; t <= o; t++) {
                        const e = h.getMicState(t);
                        e && e.user_id && g == t && msLeaveMyMic(t),
                        h.setMicState(t, null)
                    }
                    const t = document.getElementById("room_mic_ui");
                    if (t && (t.innerHTML = "",
                    t.style.display = "none"),
                    window.mic_count = 0,
                    s) {
                        C("[UpdateMicCount] Room switch to 0-mic room - performing complete cleanup");
                        const t = M;
                        return p.consumers.forEach(( (t, e) => {
                            try {
                                t.consumer.closed || t.consumer.close()
                            } catch (t) {}
                            m.removeAudioStream(e)
                        }
                        )),
                        p.consumers.clear(),
                        m.completeCleanup(),
                        h.clearAll(),
                        Object.keys(y).forEach((t => {
                            delete y[t]
                        }
                        )),
                        M = i,
                        window.room_id = i,
                        h.initialize(i),
                        S && S.connected && (C("[UpdateMicCount] User changed room with no mic slots"),
                        t && S.emit("leave_room", {
                            room_id: k(t)
                        }),
                        S.emit("set_room_data", {
                            room_id: k(i),
                            user_sid: f || user_id + "-" + Math.floor(1e6 * Math.random()),
                            user_id: user_id
                        })),
                        void setTimeout(( () => {
                            C("[UpdateMicCount] 0-mic room switch completed"),
                            n({
                                action: "room_switched_to_0_mics",
                                micCount: 0,
                                roomChanged: !0
                            })
                        }
                        ), 2e3)
                    }
                    return void n({
                        action: "hidden",
                        micCount: 0
                    })
                }
                const a = document.getElementById("room_mic_ui");
                if (a && (a.style.display = "block"),
                t === o && !e)
                    return void n({
                        action: "no_change",
                        micCount: t
                    });
                if (t < o)
                    for (let e = o; e > t; e--) {
                        const t = h.getMicState(e);
                        t && t.user_id && g == e && msLeaveMyMic(e),
                        h.setMicState(e, null)
                    }
                if (window.mic_count = t,
                J(t),
                e) {
                    if (C("[UpdateMicCount] Force sync requested - initializing audio system"),
                    s) {
                        C("[UpdateMicCount] Switching to new room:", i);
                        const t = M;
                        for (let t = 1; t <= 20; t++)
                            h.clearMicUI(t);
                        p.consumers.forEach(( (t, e) => {
                            try {
                                t.consumer.closed || t.consumer.close()
                            } catch (t) {}
                            m.removeAudioStream(e)
                        }
                        )),
                        p.consumers.clear(),
                        m.completeCleanup(),
                        h.clearAll(),
                        Object.keys(y).forEach((t => {
                            delete y[t]
                        }
                        )),
                        M = i,
                        window.room_id = i,
                        h.initialize(i),
                        S && S.connected && (t && S.emit("leave_room", {
                            room_id: k(t)
                        }),
                        S.emit("set_room_data", {
                            room_id: k(i),
                            user_sid: f || user_id + "-" + Math.floor(1e6 * Math.random()),
                            user_id: user_id
                        }))
                    }
                    setTimeout(( () => {
                        if (s) {
                            if (C("[UpdateMicCount] Resetting transports for new room"),
                            p.recvTransport) {
                                try {
                                    p.recvTransport.closed || p.recvTransport.close()
                                } catch (t) {}
                                p.recvTransport = null
                            }
                            if (p.sendTransport) {
                                try {
                                    p.sendTransport.closed || p.sendTransport.close()
                                } catch (t) {}
                                p.sendTransport = null
                            }
                            p.device && (p.device = null)
                        }
                        if (V(),
                        S && S.connected) {
                            const e = k(M);
                            new Promise((t => {
                                S.emit("ms::getMicStatus", {
                                    channelId: e
                                }, (e => {
                                    if (e && e.micStatus) {
                                        C("[UpdateMicCount] Received server mic status for force sync"),
                                        h.micStates.clear();
                                        for (let t = 1; t <= (window.mic_count || 20); t++)
                                            h.clearMicUI(t);
                                        let t = 0;
                                        Object.keys(e.micStatus).forEach((i => {
                                            if (e.micStatus[i] && e.micStatus[i].user_id) {
                                                if (e.micStatus[i].user_id == user_id)
                                                    return void C("[UpdateMicCount] WARNING: Server shows current user on mic", i, "but local state was cleared - server sync issue");
                                                C("[UpdateMicCount] Setting mic", i, "for user", e.micStatus[i].user_name),
                                                h.setMicState(i, e.micStatus[i]),
                                                t++
                                            }
                                        }
                                        )),
                                        C("[UpdateMicCount] Applied", t, "mic states from server"),
                                        h.applyAllToUI()
                                    } else {
                                        C("[UpdateMicCount] No mic status from server - ensuring clean state"),
                                        h.micStates.clear();
                                        for (let t = 1; t <= (window.mic_count || 20); t++)
                                            h.clearMicUI(t)
                                    }
                                    t()
                                }
                                ))
                            }
                            )).then(( () => {
                                setTimeout(( () => {
                                    S.emit("ms::listProducers", {
                                        channelId: e
                                    }, (e => {
                                        if (e && e.list && e.list.length > 0) {
                                            C("[UpdateMicCount] Found", e.list.length, "producers to consume");
                                            const i = e.list.map((t => F(t).then(( () => (C("[UpdateMicCount] Successfully consumed producer:", t.producerId),
                                            !0))).catch((e => (C("[UpdateMicCount] Failed to consume producer:", t.producerId, e.message),
                                            !1)))));
                                            Promise.allSettled(i).then((i => {
                                                const o = i.filter((t => "fulfilled" === t.status && !0 === t.value)).length;
                                                C("[UpdateMicCount] Producer consumption completed:", o, "successful,", i.filter((t => "rejected" === t.status || !1 === t.value)).length, "failed"),
                                                setTimeout(( () => {
                                                    m.resumeAllAudio();
                                                    m.loadGlobalMuteState() && (m.setGlobalMute(!0),
                                                    P(),
                                                    C("[UpdateMicCount] Restored global mute state after room sync"))
                                                }
                                                ), 500),
                                                n({
                                                    action: "force_synced",
                                                    micCount: t,
                                                    roomChanged: s,
                                                    audioRestored: o,
                                                    totalProducers: e.list.length
                                                })
                                            }
                                            ))
                                        } else
                                            C("[UpdateMicCount] No producers to consume in this room"),
                                            setTimeout(( () => {
                                                m.loadGlobalMuteState() && (m.setGlobalMute(!0),
                                                P(),
                                                C("[UpdateMicCount] Restored global mute state (no producers)"))
                                            }
                                            ), 500),
                                            n({
                                                action: "force_synced",
                                                micCount: t,
                                                roomChanged: s,
                                                audioRestored: 0,
                                                totalProducers: 0
                                            })
                                    }
                                    ))
                                }
                                ), 800)
                            }
                            ))
                        } else
                            C("[UpdateMicCount] No socket connection available"),
                            n({
                                action: "updated",
                                micCount: t,
                                socketConnected: !1
                            })
                    }
                    ), s ? 2e3 : 1e3)
                } else
                    n({
                        action: "updated",
                        micCount: t
                    })
            } catch (t) {
                C("[UpdateMicCount] Critical error:", t),
                o(t)
            }
        }
        ))
    }
    function J(t) {
        const e = document.getElementById("room_mic_ui");
        e && (e.innerHTML = G(t, !0),
        setTimeout(( () => {
            e.innerHTML = G(t),
            K(),
            P(),
            h.applyAllToUI()
        }
        ), 500))
    }
    function K() {
        $("#mute_toggle, #join_broadcast").off("click.mute").on("click.mute", (function(t) {
            t.preventDefault(),
            toggleAudioMute()
        }
        )),
            $(document).off("click.mics").on("click.mics", ".star_audio .icon", (function(t) {
    if (t.preventDefault(),
    
    // التحقق من الرتبة أولاً - هذه هي الإضافة الجديدة
    (typeof user_rank !== 'undefined' && typeof mic_rank !== 'undefined' && user_rank < mic_rank)) {
        showNotify(`This microphone requires rank ${mic_rank} or higher. Your current rank: ${user_rank}`, "warning", {
            title: "Insufficient Rank",
            duration: 5000
        });
        return !1;
    }
    
      if ("function" == typeof boomAllow && !boomAllow(mic_rank))
        return !1;
    if (1 === v)
        return !1;
    const e = $(this).attr("id")?.replace("avatar_mic", "");
    if (!e || $("#avatar_mic" + e).find("img").length)
        return !1;
    if (!confirm("Are you sure you want to join the microphone?"))
        return;

initCall = function(t){
	hideAllModal();
	hideCallRequest();
	hideCall();
	hidePanel();
	$('#wrap_call').html(t.data);
	$('.callwidth').css('width', t.w+'px');
	$('.callheight').css('height', t.h+'px');
	showCall();
}

startCall = function(id, type){
	hideAllModal();
	$.post('system/action/action_call.php', { 
			init_call: id,
			call_type: type,
		}, function(response) {
			if(response.code == 1){
				overEmptyModal(response.data);
			}
	}, 'json');
}
openCall = function(id){
	hideAllModal();
	$.post('system/box/call_box.php', { 
			target: id,
		}, function(response) {
			if(response){
				overModal(response);
			}
	});
}
cancelCall = function(id){
	$.post('system/action/action_call.php', { 
			cancel_call: id,
		}, function(response) {
			hideOver();
	}, 'json');
}
acceptCall = function(){
	$.post('system/action/action_call.php', { 
			accept_call: $('#call_request').attr('data'),
		}, function(response) {
			if(response.code == 1){
				initCall(response);
			}
			else{
				hideCallRequest();
			}
	}, 'json');
}
joinGroupCall = function(id, rank){
	var gpass = '';
	if ($("#call_password").length){
		gpass = $('#call_password').val();
	}
	if(!boomAllow(rank)){
		callError(system.access_requirement);
		return;
	}
	$.post('system/action/action_group_call.php', { 
			join_group_call: id,
			call_key: gpass,
		}, function(response) {
			if(response.code == 1){
				initCall(response);
			}
			else if(response.code == 3){
				hideOver();
			}
	}, 'json');
}
openJoinGroupCall = function(id, rank){
	if(!boomAllow(rank)){
		callError(system.access_requirement);
		return;
	}
	$.post('system/box/join_group_call.php', { 
			call_id: id,
		}, function(response) {
			if(response){
				overModal(response, 320);
			}
	});
}
declineCall = function(){
	$.post('system/action/action_call.php', { 
			decline_call: $('#call_request').attr('data'),
		}, function(response) {
			hideCallRequest();
	}, 'json');
}

updateCall = function(type){
	if($('#call_pending:visible').length){
		
		$.post('system/action/action_call.php', { 
				update_call: $('#call_pending').attr('data'),
			}, function(response) {
				if(response.code == 1){
					initCall(response);
				}
				else if(response.code == 0){
					hideOver();
				}
		}, 'json');	
	}
}

updateIncomingCall = function(type){
	if($('#call_request:visible').length){
		$.post('system/action/action_call.php', { 
				update_incoming_call: $('#call_request').attr('data'),
			}, function(response) {
				if(response.code == 99){
					hideCallRequest();
				}
		}, 'json');	
	}
}

hideCallRequest = function(){
	$('#call_request').attr('data', '');
	$('#call_request_type').text('');
	$('#call_request_name').text('');
	$('#call_request_avatar').attr('src', '');
	$('#call_request').addClass('fhide');
}
showCallRequest = function(d){
	$('#call_request').attr('data', d.call_id);
	$('#call_request_type').text(d.call_type);
	$('#call_request_name').text(d.call_username);
	$('#call_request_avatar').attr('src', d.call_avatar);
	$('#call_request').removeClass('fhide');
}

checkCall = function(ncall){
	if(ncall > uCall){
		uCall = ncall;
		$.post('system/action/action_call.php', { 
				check_call: inCall(),
			}, function(response) {
				if(response.code == 1){
					showCallRequest(response.data);
				}
		}, 'json');	
	}	
}

inCall = function(){
	if($('#call_pending:visible').length || $('#call_request:visible').length || $('#container_call:visible').length){
		return 1;
	}
	else {
		return 0;
	}
}

callOff = function(){
	$('.vcallstream').removeClass('over_stream');
}
callOn = function(){
	if(!insideChat()){
		$('.vidminus').replaceWith("");
	}
	if($('.modal_in:visible').length){
		$('.vidstream').addClass('over_stream');
	}
	else {
		vidOff();
	}
}

hideCall = function(){
	$('#wrap_call').html('');
	$('#container_call').hide();
	$('#mstream_call').addClass('streamhide');
}
showCall = function(){
	$("#container_call").removeClass('streamout').fadeIn(300);
}

toggleCall = function(type){
	if(type == 1){
		$("#container_call").addClass('streamout');
		$('#mstream_call').removeClass('streamhide');
	}
	if(type == 2){
		$("#container_call").removeClass('streamout');
		$('#mstream_call').addClass('streamhide');
	}
}

openAddCall = function(){
	$.post('system/box/create_group_call.php', {
		}, function(response) {
			overModal(response);
	});
}
editGroupCall = function(id){
	hideAllModal();
	$.post('system/box/edit_group_call.php', { 
			call_id: id,
		}, function(response) {
			if(response){
				showModal(response);
			}
	});
}
var waitGcall = 0;
addGroupCall = function(){
	if(waitGcall == 0){
		waitGcall = 1;
		$.ajax({
			url: "system/action/action_group_call.php",
			type: "post",
			cache: false,
			dataType: 'json',
			data: { 
				add_group_call: 1,
				call_name: $('#set_call_name').val(),
				call_password: $('#set_call_password').val(),
				call_access: $('#set_call_access').val(),
				call_type: $('#group_call_form').attr('data-type'),
			},
			success: function(response){
				if(response.code == 1){
					joinGroupCall(response.room, response.rank);
				}
				waitGcall = 0;
			},
			error: function(){
				waitGcall = 0;
			}
		});	
	}
}

saveGroupCall = function(id){
	$.ajax({
		url: "system/action/action_group_call.php",
		type: "post",
		cache: false,
		dataType: 'json',
		data: { 
			save_group_call: 1,
			call_id: id,
			call_name: $('#save_call_name').val(),
			call_password: $('#save_call_password').val(),
			call_access: $('#save_call_access').val(),
		},
		success: function(response){
			if(response.code == 1){
				hideModal();
			}
		}
	});	
}

showCallError = function(e){
	$.post('system/box/call_error.php', { 
			error: e,
		}, function(response) {
			if(response){
				overModal(response, 320);
			}
	});
}


$(document).ready(function(){
	callUpdate = setInterval(updateCall, 3000);
	callIncoming = setInterval(updateIncomingCall, 3000);
	updateCall();
	updateIncomingCall();
	
	$(document).on('click', '.opencall', function(){
		var calluser = $(this).attr('data');
		openCall(calluser);
	});
	$(document).on('click', '.startcall', function(){
		var cuser = $(this).attr('data-user');
		var ctype = $(this).attr('data-type');
		startCall(cuser, ctype);
	});
	$(document).on('click', '.hide_call', function(){
		hideCall();
	});
	
	$(window).on("message", function(event) {
		const e = event.originalEvent;
		if (e.origin !== window.location.origin) {
			return;
		}
		const data = e.data;
		if (data.type === 'endCall') {
			hideCall();
			callendPlay();
			if(data.code != 99){
				showCallError(data.code);
			}
		}
	});
	
	$(document).on('change, paste, keyup', '#search_call_room', function(){
		var sr = $(this).val().toLowerCase();
		if(sr == ''){
			$(".call_element").each(function(){
				$(this).show();
			});	
		}
		else {
			$(".call_element").each(function(){
				var rt = $(this).find('.call_name').text().toLowerCase();
				var rd = $(this).find('.callusername').text().toLowerCase();
				if(rt.indexOf(sr) < 0 && rd.indexOf(sr) < 0){
					$(this).hide();
				}
				else {
					$(this).show();
				}
			});
		}
	});
});<!DOCTYPE html>

		<div class="subi subm_icon bcell_mid">
		<i class="fa fa-exclamation-circle"></i>
	</div>
